Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(***************************************************************************

 Monoidal functors

 In this file, we define the several notions of functors between monoidal
 categories. Again we use a displayed approach where we define notions such
 as lax monoidal structures on functors. We also provide examples, such as
 the identity and composition. In the end, we provide bundled versions of
 these defintions.

 Note that for the bundled versions we reformulate the laws to guarantee the
 notation is consistent with the bundled versions for monoidal categories.

 Contents
 1. Lax monoidal functors
 2. Strong monoidal functors
 3. Strict monoidal functors
 4. Symmetric monoidal functors
 5. The identity is strong monoidal
 6. Composition preserves lax/strongly monoidal functors
 7. Monoidal natural transformations
 8. Inverses of monoidal natural transformations
 9. Bundled versions
 10. Builders for the bundled versions

Note: after refactoring on March 10, 2023, the prior Git history of this development is found via
git log -- UniMath/CategoryTheory/Monoidal/MonoidalFunctorsWhiskered.v

 ***************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.WhiskeredBifunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Symmetric.

Local Open Scope cat.

Import BifunctorNotations.
Import MonoidalNotations.

Section local_helper_lemmas.
  
C: category
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: g = f
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
is_z_isomorphism g

  
C: category
x, y: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: g = f
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
is_z_isomorphism g

    
C: category
x, y: C
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism g
is_z_isomorphism g

    exact Hf.
  Qed.

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
pf: y = z
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
is_z_isomorphism
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms x) pf f)

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
pf: y = z
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
is_z_isomorphism
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms x) pf f)

    
C: category
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
is_z_isomorphism
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms x) (idpath y) f)

    use Hf.
  Qed.

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
pf: y = z
qg: g = transportf (precategory_morphisms x) pf f
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
is_z_isomorphism g

  
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
pf: y = z
qg: g = transportf (precategory_morphisms x) pf f
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
is_z_isomorphism g

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
pf: y = z
qg: g = transportf (precategory_morphisms x) pf f
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
is_z_isomorphism
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms x) pf f)

    
C: category
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
pf: y = z
qg: g = transportf (precategory_morphisms x) pf f
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
is_z_isomorphism f

    exact Hf.
  Qed.
End local_helper_lemmas.


Section MonoidalFunctors.
  (**
   1. Lax monoidal functors
   *)
  (** (Weak) Monoidal functors **)
  (* Monoidal functor data *)

  Definition preserves_tensordata
             {C D : category}
             (M : monoidal C)
             (N : monoidal D)
             (F : functor C D)
    : UU
    := ∏ (x y : C), D ⟦ F x ⊗_{ N} F y, F (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⟧.

  Definition preserves_unit
             {C D : category}
             (M : monoidal C)
             (N : monoidal D)
             (F : functor C D)
    : UU
    := D ⟦ I_{N} , F I_{M} ⟧.

  Definition fmonoidal_data
             {C D : category}
             (M : monoidal C)
             (N : monoidal D)
             (F : functor C D)
    : UU
    := preserves_tensordata M N F × preserves_unit M N F.

  Definition fmonoidal_preservestensordata
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C}
             {N : monoidal D}
             {F : functor C D}
             (fmd : fmonoidal_data M N F)
    : preserves_tensordata M N F
    := pr1 fmd.

  Definition fmonoidal_preservesunit
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C}
             {N : monoidal D}
             {F : functor C D}
             (fmd : fmonoidal_data M N F)
    : preserves_unit M N F
    := pr2 fmd.

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fmd1, fmd2: fmonoidal_data M N F
(∏ x y : C,
 fmonoidal_preservestensordata fmd1 x y =
 fmonoidal_preservestensordata fmd2 x y)
→ fmonoidal_preservesunit fmd1 =
  fmonoidal_preservesunit fmd2 → fmd1 = fmd2

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fmd1, fmd2: fmonoidal_data M N F
(∏ x y : C,
 fmonoidal_preservestensordata fmd1 x y =
 fmonoidal_preservestensordata fmd2 x y)
→ fmonoidal_preservesunit fmd1 =
  fmonoidal_preservesunit fmd2 → fmd1 = fmd2

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fmd1, fmd2: fmonoidal_data M N F
pT: ∏ x y : C,
fmonoidal_preservestensordata fmd1 x y =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata fmd2 x y
pU: fmonoidal_preservesunit fmd1 =
fmonoidal_preservesunit fmd2
fmd1 = fmd2

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fmd1, fmd2: fmonoidal_data M N F
pT: ∏ x y : C,
fmonoidal_preservestensordata fmd1 x y =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata fmd2 x y
pU: fmonoidal_preservesunit fmd1 =
fmonoidal_preservesunit fmd2
pr1 fmd1 = pr1 fmd2
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fmd1, fmd2: fmonoidal_data M N F
pT: ∏ x y : C,
fmonoidal_preservestensordata fmd1 x y =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata fmd2 x y
pU: fmonoidal_preservesunit fmd1 =
fmonoidal_preservesunit fmd2
transportf
  (λ _ : preserves_tensordata M N F,
   preserves_unit M N F) 
  ?p (pr2 fmd1) = pr2 fmd2

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fmd1, fmd2: fmonoidal_data M N F
pT: ∏ x y : C,
fmonoidal_preservestensordata fmd1 x y =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata fmd2 x y
pU: fmonoidal_preservesunit fmd1 =
fmonoidal_preservesunit fmd2
pr1 fmd1 = pr1 fmd2
 do 2 (apply funextsec ; intro) ; apply pT.
    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fmd1, fmd2: fmonoidal_data M N F
pT: ∏ x y : C,
fmonoidal_preservestensordata fmd1 x y =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata fmd2 x y
pU: fmonoidal_preservesunit fmd1 =
fmonoidal_preservesunit fmd2
transportf
  (λ _ : preserves_tensordata M N F,
   preserves_unit M N F)
  (funextsec
     (λ t : C,
      ∏ y : C, D ⟦ F t ⊗_{ N} F y, F (t ⊗_{ M} y) ⟧)
     (pr1 fmd1) (pr1 fmd2)
     ((λ x : C,
       funextsec
         (λ t : C,
          D ⟦ F x ⊗_{ N} F t, F (x ⊗_{ M} t) ⟧)
         (pr1 fmd1 x) (pr1 fmd2 x)
         ((λ x0 : C, pT x x0)
          :
          pr1 fmd1 x ~ pr1 fmd2 x))
      :
      pr1 fmd1 ~ pr1 fmd2)) (pr2 fmd1) = pr2 fmd2
 
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fmd1, fmd2: fmonoidal_data M N F
pT: ∏ x y : C,
fmonoidal_preservestensordata fmd1 x y =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata fmd2 x y
pU: fmonoidal_preservesunit fmd1 =
fmonoidal_preservesunit fmd2
idfun (preserves_unit M N F) (pr2 fmd1) = pr2 fmd2

      apply pU.
  Qed.

  (** Properties **)
  Definition preserves_tensor_nat_left
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C}
             {N : monoidal D}
             {F : functor C D}
             (pt : preserves_tensordata M N F)
    : UU
    := ∏ (x y1 y2 : C) (g : C⟦y1,y2⟧),
       F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} # F g · pt x y2
       =
       pt x y1 · # F (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g).

  Definition preserves_tensor_nat_right
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C}
             {N : monoidal D}
             {F : functor C D}
             (pt : preserves_tensordata M N F)
    : UU
    := ∏ (x1 x2 y : C) (f : C⟦x1,x2⟧),
       # F f ⊗^{ N}_{r} F y · pt x2 y
       =
       pt x1 y · # F (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y).

  Definition preserves_leftunitality
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C}
             {N : monoidal D}
             {F : functor C D}
             (pt : preserves_tensordata M N F)
             (pu : preserves_unit M N F)
    : UU
    := ∏ (x : C),
       (pu ⊗^{ N}_{r} F x) · (pt I_{M} x) · (# F lu^{ M }_{ x})
       =
       lu^{ N }_{ F x}.

  Definition preserves_leftunitalityinv
         {C D : category}
         {M : monoidal C}
         {N : monoidal D}
         {F : functor C D}
         (pt : preserves_tensordata M N F)
         (pu : preserves_unit M N F)
    : UU
    := ∏ (x : C),
       luinv^{ N }_{ F x} · (pu ⊗^{ N}_{r} F x) · (pt I_{M} x)
       =
       # F luinv^{ M }_{ x}.

  Definition preserves_rightunitality
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C}
             {N : monoidal D}
             {F : functor C D}
             (pt : preserves_tensordata M N F)
             (pu : preserves_unit M N F)
    : UU
    := ∏ (x : C),
       ((F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pu) · (pt x I_{M}) · (# F ru^{ M }_{ x})
       =
       ru^{ N }_{ F x}).

  Definition preserves_rightunitalityinv
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C}
             {N : monoidal D}
             {F : functor C D}
             (pt : preserves_tensordata M N F)
             (pu : preserves_unit M N F)
    : UU
    := ∏ (x : C),
       ruinv^{ N }_{ F x} · F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pu · pt x I_{M}
       =
       # F ruinv^{ M }_{ x}.

  Definition preserves_associativity
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C}
             {N : monoidal D}
             {F : functor C D}
             (pt : preserves_tensordata M N F)
    : UU
    := ∏ (x y z : C),
       ((pt x y) ⊗^{N}_{r} (F z)) · (pt (x ⊗_{M} y) z) · (#F (α^{M}_{x,y,z}))
       =
       α^{N}_{F x, F y, F z} · ((F x) ⊗^{N}_{l} (pt y z)) · (pt x (y ⊗_{M} z)).

  Definition preserves_associativityinv
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C}
             {N : monoidal D}
             {F : functor C D}
             (pt : preserves_tensordata M N F)
    : UU
    := ∏ (x y z : C),
       αinv^{N}_{F x, F y, F z} · ((pt x y) ⊗^{N}_{r} (F z)) · (pt (x ⊗_{M} y) z)
       =
       ((F x) ⊗^{N}_{l} (pt y z)) · (pt x (y ⊗_{M} z)) · (#F (αinv^{M}_{x,y,z})).

  Definition fmonoidal_laxlaws
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C}
             {N : monoidal D}
             {F : functor C D}
             (fmd : fmonoidal_data M N F)
    : UU
    := (preserves_tensor_nat_left (fmonoidal_preservestensordata fmd)) ×
       (preserves_tensor_nat_right (fmonoidal_preservestensordata fmd)) ×
       (preserves_associativity (fmonoidal_preservestensordata fmd)) ×
       (preserves_leftunitality
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata fmd)
          (fmonoidal_preservesunit fmd)) ×
       (preserves_rightunitality
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata fmd)
          (fmonoidal_preservesunit fmd)).

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fmd: fmonoidal_data M N F
isaprop (fmonoidal_laxlaws fmd)

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fmd: fmonoidal_data M N F
isaprop (fmonoidal_laxlaws fmd)

    repeat (apply isapropdirprod); repeat (apply impred; intro); apply D.
  Qed.

  Definition fmonoidal_lax
             {C D : category}
             (M : monoidal C)
             (N : monoidal D)
             (F : functor C D)
    : UU
    := ∑ (fmd : fmonoidal_data M N F), fmonoidal_laxlaws fmd.

  Definition fmonoidal_fdata
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C}
             {N : monoidal D}
             {F : functor C D}
             (fm : fmonoidal_lax M N F)
    : fmonoidal_data M N F
    := pr1 fm.
  Coercion fmonoidal_fdata : fmonoidal_lax >-> fmonoidal_data.

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fmd, fmd': fmonoidal_lax M N F
pr1 fmd = pr1 fmd' → fmd = fmd'

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fmd, fmd': fmonoidal_lax M N F
pr1 fmd = pr1 fmd' → fmd = fmd'

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fmd, fmd': fmonoidal_lax M N F
H: pr1 fmd = pr1 fmd'
fmd = fmd'

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fmd, fmd': fmonoidal_lax M N F
H: pr1 fmd = pr1 fmd'
isPredicate fmonoidal_laxlaws
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fmd, fmd': fmonoidal_lax M N F
H: pr1 fmd = pr1 fmd'
pr1 fmd = pr1 fmd'

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fmd, fmd': fmonoidal_lax M N F
H: pr1 fmd = pr1 fmd'
isPredicate fmonoidal_laxlaws
 intro; apply isaprop_fmonoidal_laxlaws.
    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fmd, fmd': fmonoidal_lax M N F
H: pr1 fmd = pr1 fmd'
pr1 fmd = pr1 fmd'
 exact H.
  Qed.

  Definition fmonoidal_flaws
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C}
             {N : monoidal D}
             {F : functor C D}
             (fm : fmonoidal_lax M N F)
    : fmonoidal_laxlaws fm
    := pr2 fm.

  Definition fmonoidal_preservestensornatleft
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C}
             {N : monoidal D}
             {F : functor C D}
             (fm : fmonoidal_lax M N F)
    : preserves_tensor_nat_left (fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm)
    := pr12 fm.

  Definition fmonoidal_preservestensornatright
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C}
             {N : monoidal D}
             {F : functor C D}
             (fm : fmonoidal_lax M N F)
    : preserves_tensor_nat_right (fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm)
    := pr122 fm.

  Definition fmonoidal_preservesassociativity
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C}
             {N : monoidal D}
             {F : functor C D}
             (fm : fmonoidal_lax M N F)
    : preserves_associativity (fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm)
    := pr1 (pr222 fm).

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
preserves_associativityinv
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm)

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
preserves_associativityinv
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm)

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
x, y, z: C
αinv^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z =
F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm y z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
· # F αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
x, y, z: C
αinv^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z) =
F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm y z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
· # F αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
x, y, z: C
fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z =
(α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z},,
 αinv^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z},,
 monoidal_associatorisolaw N (F x) (F y) (F z))
· (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm y z
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
   · # F αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z})

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
x, y, z: C
fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm y z
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
   · # F αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z})

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
x, y, z: C
fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z = 
?b
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
x, y, z: C
?b =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm y z
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
   · # F αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z})

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
x, y, z: C
?b =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm y z
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
   · # F αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
 
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
x, y, z: C
?b =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm y z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
· # F αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
 
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
x, y, z: C
?f =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm y z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)

         apply fmonoidal_preservesassociativity. 
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
x, y, z: C
fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} · # F αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
x, y, z: C
fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
   · (# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
      · # F αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}))

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
x, y, z: C
fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· (# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} · # F αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z})

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F

M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D

fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
x, y, z: C
fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z =

C, D: category
M: monoidal C

x, y, z: C

· identity (F ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z))

    apply pathsinv0, id_right.
  Qed.

  Definition fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C}
             {N : monoidal D}
             {F : functor C D}
             (fm : fmonoidal_lax M N F)
    : preserves_leftunitality
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm)
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit fm)
    := pr12 (pr222 fm).

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
preserves_leftunitalityinv
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm)
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit fm)

  (fmonoidal_preservesunit fm)

x: C
luinv^{ N }_{ F x}
· fmonoidal_preservesunit fm ⊗^{ N}_{r} F x
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata fm I_{ M} x =
# F luinv^{ M }_{ x}

(lu^{ N }_{ F x},,

             {C D : category}

             (fm : fmonoidal_lax M N F)
    : preserves_rightunitality

    := pr22 (pr222 fm).

  Definition preserves_tensor_strongly
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C} {N : monoidal D}
             {F : functor C D}
             (pt : preserves_tensordata M N F)
    : UU
    := ∏ (x y : C), is_z_isomorphism (pt x y).

  Definition pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C} {N : monoidal D}
             {F : functor C D}
             {pt : preserves_tensordata M N F}
             (pts : preserves_tensor_strongly pt) (x y : C)
    : z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F (x ⊗_{ M} y))
    := pt x y ,, pts x y.

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptα: preserves_associativity pt
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
x, y, z: C
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x y) ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x (y ⊗_{ M} z))
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts y z)

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptα: preserves_associativity pt
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
x, y, z: C
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x y) ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x (y ⊗_{ M} z))
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts y z)

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptα: preserves_associativity pt
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
x, y, z: C
ptsx_yz:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts x (y ⊗_{ M} z): z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
  (F (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x y) ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x (y ⊗_{ M} z))
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts y z)

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptα: preserves_associativity pt
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
x, y, z: C
ptsx_yz:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts x (y ⊗_{ M} z): z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
  (F (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsxy_z:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z: z_iso (F (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ N} F z)
  (F ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z))
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x y) ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x (y ⊗_{ M} z))
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts y z)

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D

ptα: preserves_associativity pt
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
x, y, z: C
ptsx_yz:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts x (y ⊗_{ M} z): z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
  (F (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsxy_z:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z: z_iso (F (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ N} F z)
  (F ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z))
ptsfx:= functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N (F x))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts y z): z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z))
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x y) ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x (y ⊗_{ M} z))
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts y z)

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptα: preserves_associativity pt
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
x, y, z: C
ptsx_yz:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts x (y ⊗_{ M} z): z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
  (F (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z)))

  pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z: z_iso (F (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ N} F z)
  (F ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z))
ptsfx:= functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N (F x))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts y z): z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z))
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsfz:= functor_on_z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N (F z))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts x y): z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F x ⊗_{ N} F y))
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)))
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x y) ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x (y ⊗_{ M} z))
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts y z)


    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptα: preserves_associativity pt
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
x, y, z: C
ptsx_yz:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts x (y ⊗_{ M} z): z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
  (F (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsxy_z:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z: z_iso (F (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ N} F z)
  (F ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z))
ptsfx:= functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N (F x))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts y z): z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z))
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsfz:= functor_on_z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N (F z))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts x y): z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F x ⊗_{ N} F y))
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)))
# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x (y ⊗_{ M} z)) =
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x y) ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} · ptsfx

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptα: preserves_associativity pt
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
x, y, z: C
ptsx_yz:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts x (y ⊗_{ M} z): z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
  (F (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsxy_z:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z: z_iso (F (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ N} F z)
  (F ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z))
ptsfx:= functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N (F x))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts y z): z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z))
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsfz:= functor_on_z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N (F z))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts x y): z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F x ⊗_{ N} F y))
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)))
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x y) ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} · ptsfx =
# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x (y ⊗_{ M} z))

# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} = ?b
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptα: preserves_associativity pt
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
x, y, z: C
ptsx_yz:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts x (y ⊗_{ M} z): z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
  (F (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsxy_z:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z: z_iso (F (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ N} F z)
  (F ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z))
ptsfx:= functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N (F x))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts y z): z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z))
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsfz:= functor_on_z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N (F z))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts x y): z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F x ⊗_{ N} F y))
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)))
?b =
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x y) ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· (α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} · (ptsfx · ptsx_yz))

C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptα: preserves_associativity pt
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
x, y, z: C
ptsx_yz:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts x (y ⊗_{ M} z): z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
  (F (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsxy_z:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z: z_iso (F (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ N} F z)
  (F ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z))
ptsfx:= functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N (F x))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts y z): z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z))
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsfz:= functor_on_z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N (F z))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts x y): z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F x ⊗_{ N} F y))
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)))
?t1 = α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} · ptsfx · ptsx_yz

      exact (ptα x y z).
    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptα: preserves_associativity pt
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
x, y, z: C
ptsx_yz:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts x (y ⊗_{ M} z): z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
  (F (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsxy_z:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z: z_iso (F (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ N} F z)
  (F ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z))
ptsfx:= functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N (F x))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts y z): z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z))
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsfz:= functor_on_z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N (F z))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts x y): z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F x ⊗_{ N} F y))
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)))
# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x y) ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· (pt x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z · pt (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
   · # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})

M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D

ptsfx:= functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N (F x))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts y z): z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z))
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsfz:= functor_on_z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N (F z))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts x y): z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F x ⊗_{ N} F y))
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)))
# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} = ?b
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptα: preserves_associativity pt
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
x, y, z: C
ptsx_yz:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts x (y ⊗_{ M} z): z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
  (F (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsxy_z:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z: z_iso (F (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ N} F z)
  (F ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z))
ptsfx:= functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N (F x))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts y z): z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z))
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsfz:= functor_on_z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N (F z))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts x y): z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F x ⊗_{ N} F y))
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)))
?b =
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x y) ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· (pt x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z · pt (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
   · # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})

  (F (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsxy_z:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z: z_iso (F (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ N} F z)
  (F ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z))
ptsfx:= functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N (F x))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts y z): z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z))
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsfz:= functor_on_z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N (F z))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts x y): z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F x ⊗_{ N} F y))
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)))
?t1 =
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x y) ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· (pt x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z · pt (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
   · # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})

  pts x (y ⊗_{ M} z): z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F (y ⊗_{ M} z))

· (pt x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z · pt (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}

C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptα: preserves_associativity pt
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
x, y, z: C
ptsx_yz:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts x (y ⊗_{ M} z): z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
  (F (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsxy_z:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z: z_iso (F (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ N} F z)
  (F ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z))
ptsfx:= functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N (F x))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts y z): z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z))
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsfz:= functor_on_z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N (F z))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts x y): z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F x ⊗_{ N} F y))
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)))
?y =
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x y) ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pt x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z

      exact (! pr222 ptsfz).
    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptα: preserves_associativity pt
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
x, y, z: C
ptsx_yz:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts x (y ⊗_{ M} z): z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
  (F (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsxy_z:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z: z_iso (F (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ N} F z)
  (F ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z))
ptsfx:= functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N (F x))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts y z): z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z))
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsfz:= functor_on_z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N (F z))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts x y): z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F x ⊗_{ N} F y))
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)))
# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
· (identity
     (rightwhiskering_functor N (F z) (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)))
   · pt (x ⊗_{ M} y) z · # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})

M: monoidal C

  (F ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z))

  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly

  (leftwhiskering_functor N

· (pt (x ⊗_{ M} y) z · # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptα: preserves_associativity pt
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
x, y, z: C

  pts x (y ⊗_{ M} z): z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
  (F (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsxy_z:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z: z_iso (F (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ N} F z)
  (F ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z))
ptsfx:= functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N (F x))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts y z): z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z))
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsfz:= functor_on_z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N (F z))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts x y): z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F x ⊗_{ N} F y))
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)))
# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} = ?b
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptα: preserves_associativity pt
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
x, y, z: C
ptsx_yz:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts x (y ⊗_{ M} z): z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
  (F (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsxy_z:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z: z_iso (F (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ N} F z)
  (F ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z))
ptsfx:= functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N (F x))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts y z): z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z))
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsfz:= functor_on_z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N (F z))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts x y): z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F x ⊗_{ N} F y))
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)))
?b =
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
· (pt (x ⊗_{ M} y) z · # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})

M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F

· (pt (x ⊗_{ M} y) z · # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})

C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptα: preserves_associativity pt
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
x, y, z: C
ptsx_yz:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts x (y ⊗_{ M} z): z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
  (F (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsxy_z:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z: z_iso (F (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ N} F z)
  (F ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z))
ptsfx:= functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N (F x))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts y z): z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z))
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsfz:= functor_on_z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N (F z))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts x y): z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F x ⊗_{ N} F y))
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)))
?y =
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
· pt (x ⊗_{ M} y) z

      exact (! pr222 ptsxy_z).
    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptα: preserves_associativity pt
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
x, y, z: C
ptsx_yz:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts x (y ⊗_{ M} z): z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
  (F (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsxy_z:= pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
  pts (x ⊗_{ M} y) z: z_iso (F (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ N} F z)
  (F ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z))
ptsfx:= functor_on_z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N (F x))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts y z): z_iso
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z))
  (leftwhiskering_functor N 
     (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
ptsfz:= functor_on_z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N (F z))
  (pointwise_z_iso_from_preserves_tensor_strongly
     pts x y): z_iso
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F x ⊗_{ N} F y))
  (rightwhiskering_functor N 
     (F z) (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)))
# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
identity (F ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z))
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}

    apply (! id_left _).
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
ptrn: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x1 y) · # F f ⊗^{ N}_{r} F y =
# F (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x2 y)

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
ptrn: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x1 y) · # F f ⊗^{ N}_{r} F y =
# F (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x2 y)

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
ptrn: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ptiso:= pt x1 y,, pts x1 y
:
z_iso (F x1 ⊗_{ N} F y) (F (x1 ⊗_{ M} y)): z_iso (F x1 ⊗_{ N} F y) (F (x1 ⊗_{ M} y))
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x1 y) · # F f ⊗^{ N}_{r} F y =
# F (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x2 y)

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
ptrn: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ptiso:= pt x1 y,, pts x1 y
:
z_iso (F x1 ⊗_{ N} F y) (F (x1 ⊗_{ M} y)): z_iso (F x1 ⊗_{ N} F y) (F (x1 ⊗_{ M} y))
# F f ⊗^{ N}_{r} F y =
ptiso
· (# F (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x2 y))

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
ptrn: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ptiso:= pt x1 y,, pts x1 y
:
z_iso (F x1 ⊗_{ N} F y) (F (x1 ⊗_{ M} y)): z_iso (F x1 ⊗_{ N} F y) (F (x1 ⊗_{ M} y))
# F f ⊗^{ N}_{r} F y =
ptiso · # F (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x2 y)

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
ptrn: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ptiso:= pt x1 y,, pts x1 y
:
z_iso (F x1 ⊗_{ N} F y) (F (x1 ⊗_{ M} y)): z_iso (F x1 ⊗_{ N} F y) (F (x1 ⊗_{ M} y))
# F f ⊗^{ N}_{r} F y = ?b
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
ptrn: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ptiso:= pt x1 y,, pts x1 y
:
z_iso (F x1 ⊗_{ N} F y) (F (x1 ⊗_{ M} y)): z_iso (F x1 ⊗_{ N} F y) (F (x1 ⊗_{ M} y))
?b =
ptiso · # F (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x2 y)

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
ptrn: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ptiso:= pt x1 y,, pts x1 y
:
z_iso (F x1 ⊗_{ N} F y) (F (x1 ⊗_{ M} y)): z_iso (F x1 ⊗_{ N} F y) (F (x1 ⊗_{ M} y))
?b =
ptiso · # F (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x2 y)

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
ptrn: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ptiso:= pt x1 y,, pts x1 y
:
z_iso (F x1 ⊗_{ N} F y) (F (x1 ⊗_{ M} y)): z_iso (F x1 ⊗_{ N} F y) (F (x1 ⊗_{ M} y))
?y = ptiso · # F (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)

      apply ptrn.
    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
ptrn: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ptiso:= pt x1 y,, pts x1 y
:
z_iso (F x1 ⊗_{ N} F y) (F (x1 ⊗_{ M} y)): z_iso (F x1 ⊗_{ N} F y) (F (x1 ⊗_{ M} y))
# F f ⊗^{ N}_{r} F y =
# F f ⊗^{ N}_{r} F y · pt x2 y
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x2 y)

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
ptrn: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ptiso:= pt x1 y,, pts x1 y
:
z_iso (F x1 ⊗_{ N} F y) (F (x1 ⊗_{ M} y)): z_iso (F x1 ⊗_{ N} F y) (F (x1 ⊗_{ M} y))
# F f ⊗^{ N}_{r} F y =
# F f ⊗^{ N}_{r} F y
· (pt x2 y · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts x2 y))

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
ptrn: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ptiso:= pt x1 y,, pts x1 y
:
z_iso (F x1 ⊗_{ N} F y) (F (x1 ⊗_{ M} y)): z_iso (F x1 ⊗_{ N} F y) (F (x1 ⊗_{ M} y))
# F f ⊗^{ N}_{r} F y =
# F f ⊗^{ N}_{r} F y · (pt x2 y · pr1 (pts x2 y))

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
ptrn: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ptiso:= pt x1 y,, pts x1 y
:
z_iso (F x1 ⊗_{ N} F y) (F (x1 ⊗_{ M} y)): z_iso (F x1 ⊗_{ N} F y) (F (x1 ⊗_{ M} y))
# F f ⊗^{ N}_{r} F y =
# F f ⊗^{ N}_{r} F y · identity (F x2 ⊗_{ N} F y)

    apply (! id_right _).
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
ptrn: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts y x1) · F y ⊗^{ N}_{l} # F f =
# F (y ⊗^{ M}_{l} f) · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts y x2)

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
ptrn: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts y x1) · F y ⊗^{ N}_{l} # F f =
# F (y ⊗^{ M}_{l} f) · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts y x2)

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
ptrn: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ptiso:= pt y x1,, pts y x1
:
z_iso (F y ⊗_{ N} F x1) (F (y ⊗_{ M} x1)): z_iso (F y ⊗_{ N} F x1) (F (y ⊗_{ M} x1))
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts y x1) · F y ⊗^{ N}_{l} # F f =
# F (y ⊗^{ M}_{l} f) · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts y x2)

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
ptrn: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ptiso:= pt y x1,, pts y x1
:
z_iso (F y ⊗_{ N} F x1) (F (y ⊗_{ M} x1)): z_iso (F y ⊗_{ N} F x1) (F (y ⊗_{ M} x1))
F y ⊗^{ N}_{l} # F f =
ptiso
· (# F (y ⊗^{ M}_{l} f)
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts y x2))

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
ptrn: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ptiso:= pt y x1,, pts y x1
:
z_iso (F y ⊗_{ N} F x1) (F (y ⊗_{ M} x1)): z_iso (F y ⊗_{ N} F x1) (F (y ⊗_{ M} x1))
F y ⊗^{ N}_{l} # F f =
ptiso · # F (y ⊗^{ M}_{l} f)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts y x2)

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
ptrn: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ptiso:= pt y x1,, pts y x1
:
z_iso (F y ⊗_{ N} F x1) (F (y ⊗_{ M} x1)): z_iso (F y ⊗_{ N} F x1) (F (y ⊗_{ M} x1))
F y ⊗^{ N}_{l} # F f = ?b
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
ptrn: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ptiso:= pt y x1,, pts y x1
:
z_iso (F y ⊗_{ N} F x1) (F (y ⊗_{ M} x1)): z_iso (F y ⊗_{ N} F x1) (F (y ⊗_{ M} x1))
?b =
ptiso · # F (y ⊗^{ M}_{l} f)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts y x2)

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
ptrn: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ptiso:= pt y x1,, pts y x1
:
z_iso (F y ⊗_{ N} F x1) (F (y ⊗_{ M} x1)): z_iso (F y ⊗_{ N} F x1) (F (y ⊗_{ M} x1))
?b =
ptiso · # F (y ⊗^{ M}_{l} f)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts y x2)

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
ptrn: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ptiso:= pt y x1,, pts y x1
:
z_iso (F y ⊗_{ N} F x1) (F (y ⊗_{ M} x1)): z_iso (F y ⊗_{ N} F x1) (F (y ⊗_{ M} x1))
?y = ptiso · # F (y ⊗^{ M}_{l} f)

      apply ptrn.
    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
ptrn: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ptiso:= pt y x1,, pts y x1
:
z_iso (F y ⊗_{ N} F x1) (F (y ⊗_{ M} x1)): z_iso (F y ⊗_{ N} F x1) (F (y ⊗_{ M} x1))
F y ⊗^{ N}_{l} # F f =
F y ⊗^{ N}_{l} # F f · pt y x2
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts y x2)

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
ptrn: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt

f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ptiso:= pt y x1,, pts y x1
:
z_iso (F y ⊗_{ N} F x1) (F (y ⊗_{ M} x1)): z_iso (F y ⊗_{ N} F x1) (F (y ⊗_{ M} x1))
F y ⊗^{ N}_{l} # F f =
F y ⊗^{ N}_{l} # F f
· (pt y x2 · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pts y x2))

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D

pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
ptrn: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ptiso:= pt y x1,, pts y x1
:
z_iso (F y ⊗_{ N} F x1) (F (y ⊗_{ M} x1)): z_iso (F y ⊗_{ N} F x1) (F (y ⊗_{ M} x1))
F y ⊗^{ N}_{l} # F f =
F y ⊗^{ N}_{l} # F f · (pt y x2 · pr1 (pts y x2))

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pts: preserves_tensor_strongly pt
ptrn: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ptiso:= pt y x1,, pts y x1
:
z_iso (F y ⊗_{ N} F x1) (F (y ⊗_{ M} x1)): z_iso (F y ⊗_{ N} F x1) (F (y ⊗_{ M} x1))
F y ⊗^{ N}_{l} # F f =
F y ⊗^{ N}_{l} # F f · identity (F y ⊗_{ N} F x2)

    apply (! id_right _).
  Qed.

  Definition preserves_unit_strongly
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C} {N : monoidal D}
             {F : functor C D}
             (pu : preserves_unit M N F)
    : UU
    := is_z_isomorphism pu.

  Definition fmonoidal_stronglaws
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C} {N : monoidal D}
             {F : functor C D}
             (pt : preserves_tensordata M N F)
             (pu : preserves_unit M N F)
    : UU
    := preserves_tensor_strongly pt × preserves_unit_strongly pu.

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_data M N F
isaprop (fmonoidal_stronglaws (pr1 Fm) (pr2 Fm))

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_data M N F
isaprop (fmonoidal_stronglaws (pr1 Fm) (pr2 Fm))

    apply isapropdirprod ; repeat (apply impred_isaprop ; intro) ; apply isaprop_is_z_isomorphism.
  Qed.

  (**
   2. Strong monoidal functors
   *)
  Definition fmonoidal
             {C D : category}
             (M : monoidal C)
             (N : monoidal D)
             (F : functor C D)
    : UU :=
    ∑ (Fm : fmonoidal_lax M N F),
      fmonoidal_stronglaws (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm) (fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm).

  Definition fmonoidal_fmonoidallax
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C} {N : monoidal D}
             {F : functor C D}
             (Fm : fmonoidal M N F)
    : fmonoidal_lax M N F
    := pr1 Fm.
  Coercion fmonoidal_fmonoidallax : fmonoidal >-> fmonoidal_lax.

  Definition fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C} {N : monoidal D}
             {F : functor C D}
             (Fm : fmonoidal M N F)
    : preserves_tensor_strongly (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm)
    := pr12 Fm.

  Definition fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C} {N : monoidal D}
             {F : functor C D}
             (Fm : fmonoidal M N F)
    : preserves_unit_strongly (fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm)
    := pr22 Fm.

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fmd, fmd': fmonoidal M N F
pr1 fmd = pr1 fmd' → fmd = fmd'

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fmd, fmd': fmonoidal M N F
pr1 fmd = pr1 fmd' → fmd = fmd'

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fmd, fmd': fmonoidal M N F
H: pr1 fmd = pr1 fmd'
fmd = fmd'

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fmd, fmd': fmonoidal M N F
H: pr1 fmd = pr1 fmd'
isPredicate
  (λ x : fmonoidal_lax M N F,
   fmonoidal_stronglaws
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata x)
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit x))
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fmd, fmd': fmonoidal M N F
H: pr1 fmd = pr1 fmd'
pr1 fmd = pr1 fmd'

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fmd, fmd': fmonoidal M N F
H: pr1 fmd = pr1 fmd'
isPredicate
  (λ x : fmonoidal_lax M N F,
   fmonoidal_stronglaws
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata x)
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit x))
 intro; apply isaprop_fmonoidal_stronglaws.
    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
fmd, fmd': fmonoidal M N F
H: pr1 fmd = pr1 fmd'
pr1 fmd = pr1 fmd'
 exact H.
  Qed.

  (** We now show that everything behaves as expected **)
  Definition functor_imageoftensor
             {C D : category}
             (M : monoidal C)
             (F : functor C D)
    : bifunctor C C D
    := compose_bifunctor_with_functor M F.

  Definition functor_tensorofimages
             {C D : category}
             (F : functor C D)
             (N : monoidal D)
    : bifunctor C C D
    := compose_functor_with_bifunctor F F N.

  Definition preserves_tensor_is_nattrans_type
             {C D : category}
             (M : monoidal C)
             (N : monoidal D)
             (F : functor C D)
    : UU
    := binat_trans (functor_tensorofimages F N) (functor_imageoftensor M F).

  (* I really don't know how to call the following lemma *)
  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
preserves_tensor_is_nattrans_type M N F

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
preserves_tensor_is_nattrans_type M N F

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
binat_trans_data (functor_tensorofimages F N)
  (functor_imageoftensor M F)
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
is_binat_trans ?α

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
binat_trans_data (functor_tensorofimages F N)
  (functor_imageoftensor M F)
 
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
∏ a b : C,
D ⟦ a ⊗_{ functor_tensorofimages F N} b,
a ⊗_{ functor_imageoftensor M F} b ⟧

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x, y: C
D ⟦ x ⊗_{ functor_tensorofimages F N} y,
x ⊗_{ functor_imageoftensor M F} y ⟧

      apply pt.
    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
is_binat_trans
  (make_binat_trans_data (λ x y : C, pt x y))
 
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
∏ (a b1 b2 : C) (g : C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧),
a ⊗^{ functor_tensorofimages F N}_{l} g
· make_binat_trans_data (λ x y : C, pt x y) a b2 =
make_binat_trans_data (λ x y : C, pt x y) a b1
· a ⊗^{ functor_imageoftensor M F}_{l} g
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
(λ _ : ∏ (a b1 b2 : C) (g : C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧),
       a ⊗^{ functor_tensorofimages F N}_{l} g
       · make_binat_trans_data 
           (λ x y : C, pt x y) a b2 =
       make_binat_trans_data (λ x y : C, pt x y) a b1
       · a ⊗^{ functor_imageoftensor M F}_{l} g,
 ∏ (a1 a2 b : C) (f : C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
 f ⊗^{ functor_tensorofimages F N}_{r} b
 · make_binat_trans_data (λ x y : C, pt x y) a2 b =
 make_binat_trans_data (λ x y : C, pt x y) a1 b
 · f ⊗^{ functor_imageoftensor M F}_{r} b) 
  ?pr1

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
∏ (a b1 b2 : C) (g : C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧),
a ⊗^{ functor_tensorofimages F N}_{l} g
· make_binat_trans_data (λ x y : C, pt x y) a b2 =
make_binat_trans_data (λ x y : C, pt x y) a b1
· a ⊗^{ functor_imageoftensor M F}_{l} g
 
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x, y1, y2: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
x ⊗^{ functor_tensorofimages F N}_{l} g
· make_binat_trans_data (λ x y : C, pt x y) x y2 =
make_binat_trans_data (λ x y : C, pt x y) x y1
· x ⊗^{ functor_imageoftensor M F}_{l} g

        apply ptnl.
      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
(λ _ : ∏ (a b1 b2 : C) (g : C ⟦ b1, b2 ⟧),
       a ⊗^{ functor_tensorofimages F N}_{l} g
       · make_binat_trans_data (λ x y : C, pt x y) a
           b2 =
       make_binat_trans_data (λ x y : C, pt x y) a b1
       · a ⊗^{ functor_imageoftensor M F}_{l} g,
 ∏ (a1 a2 b : C) (f : C ⟦ a1, a2 ⟧),
 f ⊗^{ functor_tensorofimages F N}_{r} b
 · make_binat_trans_data (λ x y : C, pt x y) a2 b =
 make_binat_trans_data (λ x y : C, pt x y) a1 b
 · f ⊗^{ functor_imageoftensor M F}_{r} b)
  (λ (x y1 y2 : C) (g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧), ptnl x y1 y2 g)
 
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
f ⊗^{ functor_tensorofimages F N}_{r} y
· make_binat_trans_data (λ x y : C, pt x y) x2 y =
make_binat_trans_data (λ x y : C, pt x y) x1 y
· f ⊗^{ functor_imageoftensor M F}_{r} y

        apply ptnr.
  Defined.

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ N} # F g · pt x2 y2 =
pt x1 y1 · # F (f ⊗^{ M} g)

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
(g : C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ N} # F g · pt x2 y2 =
pt x1 y1 · # F (f ⊗^{ M} g)

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
# F f ⊗^{ N} # F g · pt x2 y2 =
pt x1 y1 · # F (f ⊗^{ M} g)

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
# F f ⊗^{ N} # F g · pt x2 y2 = ?b
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
?b = pt x1 y1 · # F (f ⊗^{ M} g)

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
# F f ⊗^{ N} # F g · pt x2 y2 = ?b
 
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
# F f ⊗^{ N}_{r} F y1 · F x2 ⊗^{ N}_{l} # F g
· pt x2 y2 = ?b

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
# F f ⊗^{ N}_{r} F y1
· (F x2 ⊗^{ N}_{l} # F g · pt x2 y2) = ?b

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
# F f ⊗^{ N}_{r} F y1
· (pt x2 y1 · # F (x2 ⊗^{ M}_{l} g)) = ?b

      apply assoc. 
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
# F f ⊗^{ N}_{r} F y1 · pt x2 y1
· # F (x2 ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) = pt x1 y1 · # F (f ⊗^{ M} g)

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
pt x1 y1 · # F (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
· # F (x2 ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) = pt x1 y1 · # F (f ⊗^{ M} g)

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
pt x1 y1
· (# F (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1) · # F (x2 ⊗^{ M}_{l} g)) =
pt x1 y1 · # F (f ⊗^{ M} g)

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
ptnl: preserves_tensor_nat_left pt
ptnr: preserves_tensor_nat_right pt
x1, x2, y1, y2: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
# F (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1) · # F (x2 ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) =
# F (f ⊗^{ M} g)

    apply pathsinv0, functor_comp.
  Qed.

  Definition preserves_tensor_inv_is_nattrans_type
             {C D : category}
             (M : monoidal C) (N : monoidal D)
             (F : functor C D)
    : UU
    := binat_trans (functor_imageoftensor M F) (functor_tensorofimages F N).

  (* name follows [preservestensor_is_nattrans], for lack of a better proposition *)
  Definition preservestensor_inv_is_nattrans
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C} {N : monoidal D}
             {F : functor C D}
             {pt : preserves_tensordata M N F}
             (ptnl : preserves_tensor_nat_left pt)
             (ptnr : preserves_tensor_nat_right pt)
             (ptstr: preserves_tensor_strongly pt)
    : preserves_tensor_inv_is_nattrans_type M N F
    := inv_binattrans_from_binatiso(α:=preservestensor_is_nattrans ptnl ptnr) ptstr.


  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pu: preserves_unit M N F
plu: preserves_leftunitality pt pu
∏ x : C,
pu ⊗^{ N} identity (F x) · pt I_{ M} x
· # F lu^{ M }_{ x} = lu^{ N }_{ F x}

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pu: preserves_unit M N F
plu: preserves_leftunitality pt pu
∏ x : C,
pu ⊗^{ N} identity (F x) · pt I_{ M} x
· # F lu^{ M }_{ x} = lu^{ N }_{ F x}

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pu: preserves_unit M N F
plu: preserves_leftunitality pt pu
x: C
pu ⊗^{ N} identity (F x) · pt I_{ M} x
· # F lu^{ M }_{ x} = lu^{ N }_{ F x}

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pu: preserves_unit M N F
plu: preserves_leftunitality pt pu
x: C
pu ⊗^{ N}_{r} F x · F I_{ M} ⊗^{ N}_{l} identity (F x)
· pt I_{ M} x · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} = lu^{ N }_{ F x}

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pu: preserves_unit M N F
plu: preserves_leftunitality pt pu
x: C
pu ⊗^{ N}_{r} F x · identity (F I_{ M} ⊗_{ N} F x)
· pt I_{ M} x · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} = lu^{ N }_{ F x}

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pu: preserves_unit M N F
plu: preserves_leftunitality pt pu
x: C
pu ⊗^{ N}_{r} F x · pt I_{ M} x · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ N }_{ F x}

    apply plu.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pu: preserves_unit M N F
pru: preserves_rightunitality pt pu
∏ x : C,
identity (F x) ⊗^{ N} pu · pt x I_{ M}
· # F ru^{ M }_{ x} = ru^{ N }_{ F x}

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pu: preserves_unit M N F
pru: preserves_rightunitality pt pu
∏ x : C,
identity (F x) ⊗^{ N} pu · pt x I_{ M}
· # F ru^{ M }_{ x} = ru^{ N }_{ F x}

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pu: preserves_unit M N F
pru: preserves_rightunitality pt pu
x: C
identity (F x) ⊗^{ N} pu · pt x I_{ M}
· # F ru^{ M }_{ x} = ru^{ N }_{ F x}

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pu: preserves_unit M N F
pru: preserves_rightunitality pt pu
x: C
identity (F x) ⊗^{ N}_{r} I_{ N} · F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pu
· pt x I_{ M} · # F ru^{ M }_{ x} = ru^{ N }_{ F x}

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pu: preserves_unit M N F
pru: preserves_rightunitality pt pu
x: C
identity (F x ⊗_{ N} I_{ N}) · F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pu
· pt x I_{ M} · # F ru^{ M }_{ x} = ru^{ N }_{ F x}

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pu: preserves_unit M N F
pru: preserves_rightunitality pt pu
x: C
F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pu · pt x I_{ M} · # F ru^{ M }_{ x} =
ru^{ N }_{ F x}

    apply pru.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
∏ x : C,
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm I_{ M} x)
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
  ⊗^{ N} identity (F x) · lu^{ N }_{ F x} =
# F lu^{ M }_{ x}

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
∏ x : C,
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm I_{ M} x)
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
  ⊗^{ N} identity (F x) · lu^{ N }_{ F x} =
# F lu^{ M }_{ x}

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
x: C
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm I_{ M} x)
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
  ⊗^{ N} identity (F x) · lu^{ N }_{ F x} =
# F lu^{ M }_{ x}

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
x: C
plu:= preserves_leftunitality'
  (fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality (pr1 Fm)) x: fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ N }_{ F x}
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm I_{ M} x)
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
  ⊗^{ N} identity (F x) · lu^{ N }_{ F x} =
# F lu^{ M }_{ x}

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
x: C
plu:= preserves_leftunitality'
  (fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality (pr1 Fm)) x: fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ N }_{ F x}
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm I_{ M} x)
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
  ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· (fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm)
   ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x
   · # F lu^{ M }_{ x}) = # F lu^{ M }_{ x}

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
x: C
plu:= preserves_leftunitality'
  (fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality (pr1 Fm)) x: fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ N }_{ F x}
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm I_{ M} x)
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
  ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm)
  ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x
· # F lu^{ M }_{ x} = # F lu^{ M }_{ x}


    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
x: C
plu:= preserves_leftunitality'
  (fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality (pr1 Fm)) x: fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ N }_{ F x}
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm I_{ M} x)
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
  ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm)
  ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x
· # F lu^{ M }_{ x} = ?b
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
x: C
plu:= preserves_leftunitality'
  (fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality (pr1 Fm)) x: fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ N }_{ F x}
?b = # F lu^{ M }_{ x}
 
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
x: C
plu:= preserves_leftunitality'
  (fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality (pr1 Fm)) x: fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ N }_{ F x}
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm I_{ M} x)
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
  ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm)
  ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x
· # F lu^{ M }_{ x} = ?b

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
x: C
plu:= preserves_leftunitality'
  (fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality (pr1 Fm)) x: fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ N }_{ F x}
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm I_{ M} x)
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
  ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm)
  ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x =
?y'

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
x: C
plu:= preserves_leftunitality'
  (fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality (pr1 Fm)) x: fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ N }_{ F x}
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm I_{ M} x)
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
  ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm)
  ⊗^{ N} identity (F x) = ?y'

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
x: C
plu:= preserves_leftunitality'
  (fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality (pr1 Fm)) x: fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ N }_{ F x}
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm I_{ M} x)
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
   ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
   · fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm)
     ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)) = ?y'

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
x: C
plu:= preserves_leftunitality'
  (fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality (pr1 Fm)) x: fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ N }_{ F x}
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm)
  ⊗^{ N} identity (F x) = ?t2

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
x: C
plu:= preserves_leftunitality'
  (fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality (pr1 Fm)) x: fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ N }_{ F x}
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
⊗^{ N}_{r} F x · I_{ N} ⊗^{ N}_{l} identity (F x)
· (fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) ⊗^{ N}_{r} F x
   · F I_{ M} ⊗^{ N}_{l} identity (F x)) = ?t2

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
x: C
plu:= preserves_leftunitality'
  (fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality (pr1 Fm)) x: fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ N }_{ F x}
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
⊗^{ N}_{r} F x · identity (I_{ N} ⊗_{ N} F x)
· (fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) ⊗^{ N}_{r} F x
   · identity (F I_{ M} ⊗_{ N} F x)) = ?t2

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
x: C
plu:= preserves_leftunitality'
  (fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality (pr1 Fm)) x: fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ N }_{ F x}
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
⊗^{ N}_{r} F x
· fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) ⊗^{ N}_{r} F x =
?t2

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
x: C
plu:= preserves_leftunitality'
  (fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality (pr1 Fm)) x: fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ N }_{ F x}
(pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
 · fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm)) ⊗^{ N}_{r} F x =
?t2

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
x: C
plu:= preserves_leftunitality'
  (fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality (pr1 Fm)) x: fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ N }_{ F x}
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) = ?t2

      apply (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm).
    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
x: C
plu:= preserves_leftunitality'
  (fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality (pr1 Fm)) x: fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ N }_{ F x}
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm I_{ M} x)
· identity (F I_{ M}) ⊗^{ N}_{r} F x
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x
· # F lu^{ M }_{ x} = # F lu^{ M }_{ x}

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
x: C
plu:= preserves_leftunitality'
  (fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality (pr1 Fm)) x: fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ N }_{ F x}
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm I_{ M} x)
· identity (F I_{ M} ⊗_{ N} F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x
· # F lu^{ M }_{ x} = # F lu^{ M }_{ x}

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
x: C
plu:= preserves_leftunitality'
  (fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality (pr1 Fm)) x: fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ N }_{ F x}
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm I_{ M} x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x
· # F lu^{ M }_{ x} = # F lu^{ M }_{ x}

  (fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality (pr1 Fm)) x: fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ N }_{ F x}
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm I_{ M} x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x
· # F lu^{ M }_{ x} = ?b

  (fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality (pr1 Fm)) x: fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ N }_{ F x}
?b = # F lu^{ M }_{ x}

  (fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality (pr1 Fm)) x: fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} =

x: C
plu:= preserves_leftunitality'
  (fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality (pr1 Fm)) x: fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ N }_{ F x}
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm I_{ M} x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x =
?y'

      apply (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm).
    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
x: C
plu:= preserves_leftunitality'
  (fmonoidal_preservesleftunitality (pr1 Fm)) x: fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr1 Fm) ⊗^{ N} identity (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr1 Fm) I_{ M} x · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ N }_{ F x}
identity (F (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x)) · # F lu^{ M }_{ x} =
# F lu^{ M }_{ x}

    apply id_left.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
x, y, z: C
# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y,,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm x y)
  ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z · α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm y z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)

  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y,,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm x y)
  ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z · α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm y z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)

  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,

· (inv_from_z_iso

   ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
   · (α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
      · (F x
         ⊗^{ N}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm y
                      z
         · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x
             (y ⊗_{ M} z))))

· (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm y z
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)) =

α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm y z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z) =
?t2

      exact (!(fmonoidal_preservesassociativity Fm x y z)).
    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
x, y, z: C
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y,,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm x y)
   ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
   · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y
      ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
      · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y)
          z · # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})) =
# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}

M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D

inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y,,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm x y)
  ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} = # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
x, y, z: C
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y,,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm x y)
  ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
identity (F ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z))
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}

  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,

· inv_from_z_iso

     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm x y)
  ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z =
identity (F ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z))

   ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
   · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y
      ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
      · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y)
          z)) = identity (F ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z))

          z)) = ?b

  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y,,

  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y,,

⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z =

?b =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y,,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm x y)
⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z

        apply (bifunctor_rightcomp N).

M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D

x, y, z: C
(inv_from_z_iso
   (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y,,
    fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm x y)
 · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y)
⊗^{ N}_{r} F z = ?y'

M: monoidal C

inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y,,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm x y)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y = ?t2

      apply z_iso_after_z_iso_inv.
    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
x, y, z: C
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
· (identity (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)) ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z) =
identity (F ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z))

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
