x, y, z: C
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
· (identity (F (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ N} F z)
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z) =
identity (F ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z))

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
x, y, z: C
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z =
identity (F ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z))

    apply z_iso_after_z_iso_inv.
  Qed.

  (**
   3. Strict monoidal functors
   *)
  (* Strictly preserving monoidal functors *)
  Definition preserves_tensor_strictly
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C} {N : monoidal D}
             {F : functor C D}
             (pt : preserves_tensordata M N F)
    : UU
    := ∏ (x y : C), ∑ (pf : (F x) ⊗_{N} (F y) = F (x ⊗_{M} y)),
       pt x y = transportf _ pf (identity ((F x) ⊗_{N} (F y))).

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pst: preserves_tensor_strictly pt
preserves_tensor_strongly pt

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pst: preserves_tensor_strictly pt
preserves_tensor_strongly pt

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pt: preserves_tensordata M N F
pst: preserves_tensor_strictly pt
x, y: C
is_z_isomorphism (pt x y)

    use (iso_stable_under_equalitytransportf
           (pr2 (pst x y))
           (is_z_isomorphism_identity (F x ⊗_{N} F y))).
  Qed.

  Definition preserves_unit_strictly
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C} {N : monoidal D}
             {F : functor C D}
             (pu : preserves_unit M N F) : UU
    := ∑ (pf : I_{N} = (F I_{M})),
       pu = transportf _ pf (identity I_{N}).

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pu: preserves_unit M N F
pus: preserves_unit_strictly pu
preserves_unit_strongly pu

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
pu: preserves_unit M N F
pus: preserves_unit_strictly pu
preserves_unit_strongly pu

    use (iso_stable_under_equalitytransportf (pr2 pus) (is_z_isomorphism_identity I_{N})).
  Defined.

  (**
   4. Symmetric monoidal functors
   *)
  Definition is_symmetric_monoidal_functor
             {C D : category}
             {M : monoidal C} {N : monoidal D}
             (HM : symmetric M) (HN : symmetric N)
             {F : functor C D}
             (HF : fmonoidal_lax M N F)
    : UU
    := ∏ (x y : C),
       monoidal_braiding_data (symmetric_to_braiding HN) (F x) (F y)
       · fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF y x
       =
       fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF x y
       · #F(monoidal_braiding_data (symmetric_to_braiding HM) x y).

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
HM: symmetric M
HN: symmetric N
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fmonoidal_lax M N F
isaprop (is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HM HN HF)

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
HM: symmetric M
HN: symmetric N
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fmonoidal_lax M N F
isaprop (is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HM HN HF)

    apply impred; intro c; apply impred; intro c'; apply D.
  Qed.

  (**
   5. The identity is strong monoidal
   *)
  (** towards a bicategory of monoidal categories *)
  
C: category
M: monoidal C
fmonoidal_data M M (functor_identity C)

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
fmonoidal_data M M (functor_identity C)

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
preserves_tensordata M M (functor_identity C)
C: category
M: monoidal C
preserves_unit M M (functor_identity C)

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
preserves_tensordata M M (functor_identity C)
 
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
C ⟦ functor_identity C x ⊗_{ M} functor_identity C y,
functor_identity C (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⟧
 apply identity.
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
preserves_unit M M (functor_identity C)
 apply identity.
  Defined.

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
fmonoidal_laxlaws (identity_fmonoidal_data M)

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
fmonoidal_laxlaws (identity_fmonoidal_data M)

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y1, y2: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · identity (x ⊗_{ M} y2) =
identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1) · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g
C: category
M: monoidal C
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · identity (x2 ⊗_{ M} y) =
identity (x1 ⊗_{ M} y) · f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y, z: C
identity (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· identity ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
· α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
· x ⊗^{ M}_{l} identity (y ⊗_{ M} z)
· identity (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
C: category
M: monoidal C
x: C
identity I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{r} x
· identity (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x) · lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ M }_{ x}
C: category
M: monoidal C
x: C
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} identity I_{ M}
· identity (x ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) · ru^{ M }_{ x} =
ru^{ M }_{ x}

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y1, y2: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · identity (x ⊗_{ M} y2) =
identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1) · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g
 
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y1, y2: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · identity (x ⊗_{ M} y2) =
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g
 apply id_right.
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · identity (x2 ⊗_{ M} y) =
identity (x1 ⊗_{ M} y) · f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y
 
C: category
M: monoidal C
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · identity (x2 ⊗_{ M} y) =
f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y
 apply id_right.
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y, z: C
identity (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· identity ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
· α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
· x ⊗^{ M}_{l} identity (y ⊗_{ M} z)
· identity (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
 
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y, z: C
identity (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗^{ M}_{r} z
· α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
· x ⊗^{ M}_{l} identity (y ⊗_{ M} z)

      
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y, z: C
identity ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z) · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
· x ⊗^{ M}_{l} identity (y ⊗_{ M} z)

      
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y, z: C
identity ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z) · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} · identity (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))

      
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y, z: C
identity ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z) · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}

      apply id_left.
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x: C
identity I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{r} x
· identity (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x) · lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ M }_{ x}
 
C: category
M: monoidal C
x: C
identity I_{ M} ⊗^{ M}_{r} x · lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ M }_{ x}

      
C: category
M: monoidal C
x: C
identity (I_{ M} ⊗_{ M} x) · lu^{ M }_{ x} =
lu^{ M }_{ x}

      apply id_left.
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
x: C
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} identity I_{ M}
· identity (x ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) · ru^{ M }_{ x} =
ru^{ M }_{ x}
 
C: category
M: monoidal C
x: C
x ⊗^{ M}_{l} identity I_{ M} · ru^{ M }_{ x} =
ru^{ M }_{ x}

      
C: category
M: monoidal C
x: C
identity (x ⊗_{ M} I_{ M}) · ru^{ M }_{ x} =
ru^{ M }_{ x}

      apply id_left.
  Qed.

  Definition identity_fmonoidal_lax
             {C : category}
             (M : monoidal C)
    : fmonoidal_lax M M (functor_identity C)
    := identity_fmonoidal_data M ,, identity_fmonoidal_laxlaws M.

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
fmonoidal_stronglaws
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
     (identity_fmonoidal_lax M))
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit (identity_fmonoidal_lax M))

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
fmonoidal_stronglaws
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
     (identity_fmonoidal_lax M))
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit (identity_fmonoidal_lax M))

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
preserves_tensor_strongly
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
     (identity_fmonoidal_lax M))
C: category
M: monoidal C
preserves_unit_strongly
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit (identity_fmonoidal_lax M))

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
preserves_tensor_strongly
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
     (identity_fmonoidal_lax M))
 
C: category
M: monoidal C
x, y: C
is_z_isomorphism
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
     (identity_fmonoidal_lax M) x y)
 apply is_z_isomorphism_identity.
    
C: category
M: monoidal C
preserves_unit_strongly
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit (identity_fmonoidal_lax M))
 apply is_z_isomorphism_identity.
  Defined.

  Definition identity_fmonoidal
             {C : category}
             (M : monoidal C)
    : fmonoidal M M (functor_identity C)
    := identity_fmonoidal_lax M ,, identity_fmonoidal_stronglaws M.

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
HM: symmetric M
is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HM HM
  (identity_fmonoidal_lax M)

  
C: category
M: monoidal C
HM: symmetric M
is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HM HM
  (identity_fmonoidal_lax M)

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
HM: symmetric M
x, y: C
HM (functor_identity C x) (functor_identity C y)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata
    (identity_fmonoidal_lax M) y x =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata
  (identity_fmonoidal_lax M) x y
· # (functor_identity C) (HM x y)

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
HM: symmetric M
x, y: C
pr1 HM x y · identity (y ⊗_{ M} x) =
identity (x ⊗_{ M} y) · pr1 HM x y

    
C: category
M: monoidal C
HM: symmetric M
x, y: C
pr1 HM x y = pr1 HM x y

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (**
   6. Composition preserves lax/strongly monoidal functors
   *)
  
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
fmonoidal_data M O (F ∙ G)

  
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
fmonoidal_data M O (F ∙ G)

    
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
preserves_tensordata M O (F ∙ G)
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
preserves_unit M O (F ∙ G)

    
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
preserves_tensordata M O (F ∙ G)
 
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y: C
E ⟦ (F ∙ G) x ⊗_{ O} (F ∙ G) y, (F ∙ G) (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⟧

      exact (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (F x) (F y)
             · #G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y)).
    
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
preserves_unit M O (F ∙ G)
 exact (fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm
            · #G (fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm)).
  Defined.

  
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
fmonoidal_laxlaws (comp_fmonoidal_data Fm Gm)

  
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
fmonoidal_laxlaws (comp_fmonoidal_data Fm Gm)

    
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y1, y2: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} # G (# F g)
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F y2) · # G (pr1 Fm x y2)) =
pr1 Gm (F x) (F y1) · # G (pr1 Fm x y1)
· # G (# F (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g))
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
# G (# F f) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F y)
· (pr1 Gm (F x2) (F y) · # G (pr1 Fm x2 y)) =
pr1 Gm (F x1) (F y) · # G (pr1 Fm x1 y)
· # G (# F (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
(pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) · # G (pr1 Fm x y))
⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· (pr1 Gm (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)) (F z)
   · # G (pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z))
· # G (# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}) =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x)
  ⊗^{ O}_{l} (pr1 Gm (F y) (F z) · # G (pr1 Fm y z))
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
   · # G (pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
(pr2 Gm · # G (pr2 Fm)) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x)
· (pr1 Gm (F I_{ M}) (F x) · # G (pr1 Fm I_{ M} x))
· # G (# F lu^{ M }_{ x}) = lu^{ O }_{ G (F x)}
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} (pr2 Gm · # G (pr2 Fm))
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F I_{ M}) · # G (pr1 Fm x I_{ M}))
· # G (# F ru^{ M }_{ x}) = ru^{ O }_{ G (F x)}

    
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y1, y2: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} # G (# F g)
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F y2) · # G (pr1 Fm x y2)) =
pr1 Gm (F x) (F y1) · # G (pr1 Fm x y1)
· # G (# F (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g))
 
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y1, y2: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} # G (# F g)
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F y2) · # G (pr1 Fm x y2)) = ?b
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y1, y2: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
?b =
pr1 Gm (F x) (F y1) · # G (pr1 Fm x y1)
· # G (# F (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y1, y2: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
?b =
pr1 Gm (F x) (F y1) · # G (pr1 Fm x y1)
· # G (# F (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g))
 
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y1, y2: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
?b =
pr1 Gm (F x) (F y1)
· (# G (pr1 Fm x y1) · # G (# F (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g)))
 
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y1, y2: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
?t1 = # G (pr1 Fm x y1) · # G (# F (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g))
 apply functor_comp. 
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y1, y2: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} # G (# F g)
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F y2) · # G (pr1 Fm x y2)) =
pr1 Gm (F x) (F y1)
· # G (pr1 Fm x y1 · # F (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y1, y2: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} # G (# F g)
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F y2) · # G (pr1 Fm x y2)) = ?b
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y1, y2: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
?b =
pr1 Gm (F x) (F y1)
· # G (pr1 Fm x y1 · # F (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y1, y2: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
?b =
pr1 Gm (F x) (F y1)
· # G (pr1 Fm x y1 · # F (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g))
 
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y1, y2: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
?t1 = pr1 Fm x y1 · # F (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g)
 apply fmonoidal_preservestensornatleft. 
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y1, y2: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} # G (# F g)
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F y2) · # G (pr1 Fm x y2)) =
pr1 Gm (F x) (F y1)
· # G
    (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} # F g
     · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y2)

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y1, y2: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} # G (# F g)
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F y2) · # G (pr1 Fm x y2)) =
pr1 Gm (F x) (F y1)
· (# G (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} # F g)
   · # G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y2))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y1, y2: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} # G (# F g) · pr1 Gm (F x) (F y2)
· # G (pr1 Fm x y2) =
pr1 Gm (F x) (F y1) · # G (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} # F g)
· # G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y2)

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y1, y2: C
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} # G (# F g) · pr1 Gm (F x) (F y2) =
pr1 Gm (F x) (F y1) · # G (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} # F g)

      apply fmonoidal_preservestensornatleft.
    
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
# G (# F f) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F y)
· (pr1 Gm (F x2) (F y) · # G (pr1 Fm x2 y)) =
pr1 Gm (F x1) (F y) · # G (pr1 Fm x1 y)
· # G (# F (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
 
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
# G (# F f) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F y)
· (pr1 Gm (F x2) (F y) · # G (pr1 Fm x2 y)) = ?b
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
?b =
pr1 Gm (F x1) (F y) · # G (pr1 Fm x1 y)
· # G (# F (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
?b =
pr1 Gm (F x1) (F y) · # G (pr1 Fm x1 y)
· # G (# F (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
 
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
?b =
pr1 Gm (F x1) (F y)
· (# G (pr1 Fm x1 y) · # G (# F (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))
 
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
?t1 = # G (pr1 Fm x1 y) · # G (# F (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
 apply functor_comp. 
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
# G (# F f) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F y)
· (pr1 Gm (F x2) (F y) · # G (pr1 Fm x2 y)) =
pr1 Gm (F x1) (F y)
· # G (pr1 Fm x1 y · # F (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
# G (# F f) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F y)
· (pr1 Gm (F x2) (F y) · # G (pr1 Fm x2 y)) = ?b
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
?b =
pr1 Gm (F x1) (F y)
· # G (pr1 Fm x1 y · # F (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
?b =
pr1 Gm (F x1) (F y)
· # G (pr1 Fm x1 y · # F (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
 
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
?t1 = pr1 Fm x1 y · # F (f ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
 apply fmonoidal_preservestensornatright. 
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
# G (# F f) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F y)
· (pr1 Gm (F x2) (F y) · # G (pr1 Fm x2 y)) =
pr1 Gm (F x1) (F y)
· # G
    (# F f ⊗^{ N}_{r} F y
     · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x2 y)

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
# G (# F f) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F y)
· (pr1 Gm (F x2) (F y) · # G (pr1 Fm x2 y)) =
pr1 Gm (F x1) (F y)
· (# G (# F f ⊗^{ N}_{r} F y)
   · # G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x2 y))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
# G (# F f) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F y) · pr1 Gm (F x2) (F y)
· # G (pr1 Fm x2 y) =
pr1 Gm (F x1) (F y) · # G (# F f ⊗^{ N}_{r} F y)
· # G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x2 y)

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x1, x2, y: C
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
# G (# F f) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F y) · pr1 Gm (F x2) (F y) =
pr1 Gm (F x1) (F y) · # G (# F f ⊗^{ N}_{r} F y)

      apply fmonoidal_preservestensornatright.
    
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
(pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) · # G (pr1 Fm x y))
⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· (pr1 Gm (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)) (F z)
   · # G (pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z))
· # G (# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}) =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x)
  ⊗^{ O}_{l} (pr1 Gm (F y) (F z) · # G (pr1 Fm y z))
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
   · # G (pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
 
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y
⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm 
    (x ⊗_{ M} y) z · # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x
  ⊗^{ N}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm y
               z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x
    (y ⊗_{ M} z)
(pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) · # G (pr1 Fm x y))
⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· (pr1 Gm (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)) (F z)
   · # G (pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z))
· # G (# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}) =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x)
  ⊗^{ O}_{l} (pr1 Gm (F y) (F z) · # G (pr1 Fm y z))
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
   · # G (pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
(pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) · # G (pr1 Fm x y))
⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· (pr1 Gm (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)) (F z)
   · # G (pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z))
· # G (# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}) =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x)
  ⊗^{ O}_{l} (pr1 Gm (F y) (F z) · # G (pr1 Fm y z))
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
   · # G (pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (F x) (F y)
⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm
    (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x)
  ⊗^{ O}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm
               (F y) (F z)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm 
    (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
(pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) · # G (pr1 Fm x y))
⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· (pr1 Gm (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)) (F z)
   · # G (pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z))
· # G (# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}) =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x)
  ⊗^{ O}_{l} (pr1 Gm (F y) (F z) · # G (pr1 Fm y z))
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
   · # G (pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
(pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) · # G (pr1 Fm x y))
⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· (pr1 Gm (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)) (F z)
   · # G (pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z))
· # G (# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}) =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x)
  ⊗^{ O}_{l} (pr1 Gm (F y) (F z) · # G (pr1 Fm y z))
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
   · # G (pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
(pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) · # G (pr1 Fm x y))
⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· (pr1 Gm (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)) (F z)
   · # G (pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z))
· # G (# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}) =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· (G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
   · G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} # G (pr1 Fm y z))
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
   · # G (pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· # G (pr1 Fm x y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· (pr1 Gm (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)) (F z)
   · # G (pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z))
· # G (# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}) =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· (G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
   · G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} # G (pr1 Fm y z))
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
   · # G (pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· # G (pr1 Fm x y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· (pr1 Gm (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)) (F z)
   · # G (pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z))
· # G (# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}) = ?b
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
?b =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· (G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
   · G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} # G (pr1 Fm y z))
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
   · # G (pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
?b =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· (G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
   · G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} # G (pr1 Fm y z))
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
   · # G (pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
 
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
?b =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} # G (pr1 Fm y z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z))
· # G (pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z))
 
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
?f =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} # G (pr1 Fm y z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z))

           
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
?f =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· (G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
   · (G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} # G (pr1 Fm y z)
      · pr1 Gm (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z))))
 
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
?t1 =
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} # G (pr1 Fm y z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F (y ⊗_{ M} z))

           apply pathsinv0, fmonoidal_preservestensornatleft. 
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· # G (pr1 Fm x y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· (pr1 Gm (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)) (F z)
   · # G (pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z))
· # G (# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}) =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· (G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
   · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (F x)
        (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
      · # G (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z)))
· # G (pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C

· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· # G (pr1 Fm x y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· (pr1 Gm (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)) (F z)
   · # G (pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z))
· # G (# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}) = ?b

Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G

· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =

· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
?b =

· (G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
   · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm 
        (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
      · # G (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z)))
· # G (pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z))

· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (F x)
    (F y ⊗_{ N} F z) · # G (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z)

· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =

· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)

· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (F x)
    (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)

           exact auxG. 
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· # G (pr1 Fm x y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· (pr1 Gm (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)) (F z)
   · # G (pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z))
· # G (# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}) =
pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· # G (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z)
· # G (pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· (# G (pr1 Fm x y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
   · (pr1 Gm (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)) (F z)
      · (# G (pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
         · # G (# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})))) =
pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· (pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
   · (# G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
      · (# G (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z)
         · # G (pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)))))
 
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
# G (pr1 Fm x y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· (pr1 Gm (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)) (F z)
   · (# G (pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
      · # G (# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}))) =
pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· (# G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
   · (# G (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z)
      · # G (pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z))))

· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)

· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =

· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
# G (pr1 Fm x y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· (pr1 Gm (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)) (F z)
   · (# G (pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
      · # G (# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}))) = ?b

· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)

· (# G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}

      · # G (pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z))))

· (# G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
   · (# G (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z)
      · # G (pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z))))

· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =

· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)

· (# G (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z)

M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E

G: D ⟶ E

Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
?t1 =
# G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· # G
    (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z · pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z))

           apply functor_comp. 
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
# G (pr1 Fm x y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· (pr1 Gm (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)) (F z)
   · (# G (pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
      · # G (# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}))) =
pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G
    (α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
     · (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
        · pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E

Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G

· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
# G (pr1 Fm x y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· (pr1 Gm (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)) (F z)
   · (# G (pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
      · # G (# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}))) = ?b
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
?b =
pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G
    (α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
     · (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
        · pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
?b =
pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G
    (α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
     · (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
        · pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)))
 
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
?t1 =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z · pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z))

           
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
?t1 =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} · F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)

           exact auxF. 
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
# G (pr1 Fm x y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· (pr1 Gm (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)) (F z)
   · (# G (pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
      · # G (# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}))) =
pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G
    (pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z · pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
     · # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
# G (pr1 Fm x y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· (pr1 Gm (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)) (F z)
   · (# G (pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
      · # G (# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}))) =
pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· (# G (pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z)
   · # G (pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
   · # G (# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
# G (pr1 Fm x y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)) (F z)
· # G (pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
· # G (# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}) =
pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G (pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z)
· # G (pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
· # G (# F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x, y, z: C
auxF: pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z
· pr1 Fm (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
· # F α^{ M }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr1 Fm y z
· pr1 Fm x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
auxG: pr1 Gm (F x) (F y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G α^{ N }_{ F x, F y, F z} =
α^{ O }_{ G (F x), G (F y), G (F z)}
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr1 Gm (F y) (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F y ⊗_{ N} F z)
# G (pr1 Fm x y) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F z)
· pr1 Gm (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)) (F z) =
pr1 Gm (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (F z)
· # G (pr1 Fm x y ⊗^{ N}_{r} F z)

      apply fmonoidal_preservestensornatright.
    
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
(pr2 Gm · # G (pr2 Fm)) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x)
· (pr1 Gm (F I_{ M}) (F x) · # G (pr1 Fm I_{ M} x))
· # G (# F lu^{ M }_{ x}) = lu^{ O }_{ G (F x)}
 
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
auxF: fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm ⊗^{ N}_{r} F x
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm I_{ M} x
· # F lu^{ M }_{ x} = lu^{ N }_{ F x}
(pr2 Gm · # G (pr2 Fm)) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x)
· (pr1 Gm (F I_{ M}) (F x) · # G (pr1 Fm I_{ M} x))
· # G (# F lu^{ M }_{ x}) = lu^{ O }_{ G (F x)}

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
auxF: fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm ⊗^{ N}_{r} F x
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm I_{ M} x
· # F lu^{ M }_{ x} = lu^{ N }_{ F x}
auxG: fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm I_{ N} (F x)
· # G lu^{ N }_{ F x} = lu^{ O }_{ G (F x)}
(pr2 Gm · # G (pr2 Fm)) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x)
· (pr1 Gm (F I_{ M}) (F x) · # G (pr1 Fm I_{ M} x))
· # G (# F lu^{ M }_{ x}) = lu^{ O }_{ G (F x)}

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
auxF: pr2 Fm ⊗^{ N}_{r} F x · pr1 Fm I_{ M} x
· # F lu^{ M }_{ x} = lu^{ N }_{ F x}
auxG: pr2 Gm ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x) · pr1 Gm I_{ N} (F x)
· # G lu^{ N }_{ F x} = lu^{ O }_{ G (F x)}
(pr2 Gm · # G (pr2 Fm)) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x)
· (pr1 Gm (F I_{ M}) (F x) · # G (pr1 Fm I_{ M} x))
· # G (# F lu^{ M }_{ x}) = lu^{ O }_{ G (F x)}

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
auxF: pr2 Fm ⊗^{ N}_{r} F x · pr1 Fm I_{ M} x
· # F lu^{ M }_{ x} = lu^{ N }_{ F x}
auxG: pr2 Gm ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x) · pr1 Gm I_{ N} (F x)
· # G lu^{ N }_{ F x} = lu^{ O }_{ G (F x)}
(pr2 Gm · # G (pr2 Fm)) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x)
· (pr1 Gm (F I_{ M}) (F x) · # G (pr1 Fm I_{ M} x))
· # G (# F lu^{ M }_{ x}) =
pr2 Gm ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x) · pr1 Gm I_{ N} (F x)
· # G lu^{ N }_{ F x}

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
auxF: pr2 Fm ⊗^{ N}_{r} F x · pr1 Fm I_{ M} x
· # F lu^{ M }_{ x} = lu^{ N }_{ F x}
(pr2 Gm · # G (pr2 Fm)) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x)
· (pr1 Gm (F I_{ M}) (F x) · # G (pr1 Fm I_{ M} x))
· # G (# F lu^{ M }_{ x}) =
pr2 Gm ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x) · pr1 Gm I_{ N} (F x)
· # G lu^{ N }_{ F x}

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
auxF: pr2 Fm ⊗^{ N}_{r} F x · pr1 Fm I_{ M} x
· # F lu^{ M }_{ x} = lu^{ N }_{ F x}
pr2 Gm ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x)
· # G (pr2 Fm) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x)
· (pr1 Gm (F I_{ M}) (F x) · # G (pr1 Fm I_{ M} x))
· # G (# F lu^{ M }_{ x}) =
pr2 Gm ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x) · pr1 Gm I_{ N} (F x)
· # G lu^{ N }_{ F x}

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
auxF: pr2 Fm ⊗^{ N}_{r} F x · pr1 Fm I_{ M} x
· # F lu^{ M }_{ x} = lu^{ N }_{ F x}
pr2 Gm ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x)
· # G (pr2 Fm) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x)
· (pr1 Gm (F I_{ M}) (F x) · # G (pr1 Fm I_{ M} x))
· # G (# F lu^{ M }_{ x}) =
pr2 Gm ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x) · pr1 Gm I_{ N} (F x)
· # G
    (pr2 Fm ⊗^{ N}_{r} F x · pr1 Fm I_{ M} x
     · # F lu^{ M }_{ x})

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
pr2 Gm ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x)
· # G (pr2 Fm) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x)
· (pr1 Gm (F I_{ M}) (F x) · # G (pr1 Fm I_{ M} x))
· # G (# F lu^{ M }_{ x}) =
pr2 Gm ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x) · pr1 Gm I_{ N} (F x)
· # G
    (pr2 Fm ⊗^{ N}_{r} F x · pr1 Fm I_{ M} x
     · # F lu^{ M }_{ x})

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
pr2 Gm ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x)
· # G (pr2 Fm) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x)
· (pr1 Gm (F I_{ M}) (F x) · # G (pr1 Fm I_{ M} x))
· # G (# F lu^{ M }_{ x}) =
pr2 Gm ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x) · pr1 Gm I_{ N} (F x)
· (# G (pr2 Fm ⊗^{ N}_{r} F x) · # G (pr1 Fm I_{ M} x)
   · # G (# F lu^{ M }_{ x}))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
pr2 Gm ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x)
· # G (pr2 Fm) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x)
· pr1 Gm (F I_{ M}) (F x) · # G (pr1 Fm I_{ M} x)
· # G (# F lu^{ M }_{ x}) =
pr2 Gm ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x) · pr1 Gm I_{ N} (F x)
· # G (pr2 Fm ⊗^{ N}_{r} F x) · # G (pr1 Fm I_{ M} x)
· # G (# F lu^{ M }_{ x})

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
pr2 Gm ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x)
· # G (pr2 Fm) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x)
· pr1 Gm (F I_{ M}) (F x) =
pr2 Gm ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x) · pr1 Gm I_{ N} (F x)
· # G (pr2 Fm ⊗^{ N}_{r} F x)

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
pr2 Gm ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x)
· (# G (pr2 Fm) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x)
   · pr1 Gm (F I_{ M}) (F x)) =
pr2 Gm ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x)
· (pr1 Gm I_{ N} (F x) · # G (pr2 Fm ⊗^{ N}_{r} F x))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
# G (pr2 Fm) ⊗^{ O}_{r} G (F x)
· pr1 Gm (F I_{ M}) (F x) =
pr1 Gm I_{ N} (F x) · # G (pr2 Fm ⊗^{ N}_{r} F x)

      apply fmonoidal_preservestensornatright.
    
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} (pr2 Gm · # G (pr2 Fm))
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F I_{ M}) · # G (pr1 Fm x I_{ M}))
· # G (# F ru^{ M }_{ x}) = ru^{ O }_{ G (F x)}
 
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
auxF: F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x I_{ M}
· # F ru^{ M }_{ x} = ru^{ N }_{ F x}
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} (pr2 Gm · # G (pr2 Fm))
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F I_{ M}) · # G (pr1 Fm x I_{ M}))
· # G (# F ru^{ M }_{ x}) = ru^{ O }_{ G (F x)}

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
auxF: F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x I_{ M}
· # F ru^{ M }_{ x} = ru^{ N }_{ F x}
auxG: G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (F x) I_{ N}
· # G ru^{ N }_{ F x} = ru^{ O }_{ G (F x)}
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} (pr2 Gm · # G (pr2 Fm))
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F I_{ M}) · # G (pr1 Fm x I_{ M}))
· # G (# F ru^{ M }_{ x}) = ru^{ O }_{ G (F x)}

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
auxF: F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr2 Fm · pr1 Fm x I_{ M}
· # F ru^{ M }_{ x} = ru^{ N }_{ F x}
auxG: G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr2 Gm · pr1 Gm (F x) I_{ N}
· # G ru^{ N }_{ F x} = ru^{ O }_{ G (F x)}
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} (pr2 Gm · # G (pr2 Fm))
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F I_{ M}) · # G (pr1 Fm x I_{ M}))
· # G (# F ru^{ M }_{ x}) = ru^{ O }_{ G (F x)}

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
auxF: F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr2 Fm · pr1 Fm x I_{ M}
· # F ru^{ M }_{ x} = ru^{ N }_{ F x}
auxG: G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr2 Gm · pr1 Gm (F x) I_{ N}
· # G ru^{ N }_{ F x} = ru^{ O }_{ G (F x)}
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} (pr2 Gm · # G (pr2 Fm))
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F I_{ M}) · # G (pr1 Fm x I_{ M}))
· # G (# F ru^{ M }_{ x}) =
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr2 Gm · pr1 Gm (F x) I_{ N}
· # G ru^{ N }_{ F x}

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
auxF: F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr2 Fm · pr1 Fm x I_{ M}
· # F ru^{ M }_{ x} = ru^{ N }_{ F x}
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} (pr2 Gm · # G (pr2 Fm))
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F I_{ M}) · # G (pr1 Fm x I_{ M}))
· # G (# F ru^{ M }_{ x}) =
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr2 Gm · pr1 Gm (F x) I_{ N}
· # G ru^{ N }_{ F x}

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
auxF: F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr2 Fm · pr1 Fm x I_{ M}
· # F ru^{ M }_{ x} = ru^{ N }_{ F x}
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr2 Gm
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} # G (pr2 Fm)
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F I_{ M}) · # G (pr1 Fm x I_{ M}))
· # G (# F ru^{ M }_{ x}) =
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr2 Gm · pr1 Gm (F x) I_{ N}
· # G ru^{ N }_{ F x}

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
auxF: F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr2 Fm · pr1 Fm x I_{ M}
· # F ru^{ M }_{ x} = ru^{ N }_{ F x}
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr2 Gm
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} # G (pr2 Fm)
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F I_{ M}) · # G (pr1 Fm x I_{ M}))
· # G (# F ru^{ M }_{ x}) =
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr2 Gm · pr1 Gm (F x) I_{ N}
· # G
    (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr2 Fm · pr1 Fm x I_{ M}
     · # F ru^{ M }_{ x})

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr2 Gm
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} # G (pr2 Fm)
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F I_{ M}) · # G (pr1 Fm x I_{ M}))
· # G (# F ru^{ M }_{ x}) =
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr2 Gm · pr1 Gm (F x) I_{ N}
· # G
    (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr2 Fm · pr1 Fm x I_{ M}
     · # F ru^{ M }_{ x})

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr2 Gm
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} # G (pr2 Fm)
· (pr1 Gm (F x) (F I_{ M}) · # G (pr1 Fm x I_{ M}))
· # G (# F ru^{ M }_{ x}) =
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr2 Gm · pr1 Gm (F x) I_{ N}
· (# G (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr2 Fm) · # G (pr1 Fm x I_{ M})
   · # G (# F ru^{ M }_{ x}))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr2 Gm
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} # G (pr2 Fm)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F I_{ M}) · # G (pr1 Fm x I_{ M})
· # G (# F ru^{ M }_{ x}) =
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr2 Gm · pr1 Gm (F x) I_{ N}
· # G (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr2 Fm) · # G (pr1 Fm x I_{ M})
· # G (# F ru^{ M }_{ x})

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr2 Gm
· G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} # G (pr2 Fm)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F I_{ M}) =
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr2 Gm · pr1 Gm (F x) I_{ N}
· # G (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr2 Fm)

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr2 Gm
· (G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} # G (pr2 Fm)
   · pr1 Gm (F x) (F I_{ M})) =
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} pr2 Gm
· (pr1 Gm (F x) I_{ N} · # G (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr2 Fm))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax N O G
x: C
G (F x) ⊗^{ O}_{l} # G (pr2 Fm)
· pr1 Gm (F x) (F I_{ M}) =
pr1 Gm (F x) I_{ N} · # G (F x ⊗^{ N}_{l} pr2 Fm)

      apply fmonoidal_preservestensornatleft.
  Qed.

  Definition comp_fmonoidal_lax
             {C D E : category}
             {M : monoidal C} {N : monoidal D} {O : monoidal E}
             {F : C ⟶ D} {G : D ⟶ E}
             (Fm : fmonoidal_lax M N F) (Gm : fmonoidal_lax N O G)
    : fmonoidal_lax M O (F ∙ G)
    := comp_fmonoidal_data Fm Gm ,, comp_fmonoidal_laxlaws Fm Gm.

  Section CompStrongMonoidal.
    Context {C D E : category}
            {M : monoidal C} {N : monoidal D} {O : monoidal E}
            {F : C ⟶ D} {G : D ⟶ E}
            (Fm : fmonoidal M N F) (Gm : fmonoidal N O G).

    Let comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv
      : G (F I_{M}) --> I_{O}
      := #G (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm))
         · pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Gm).

    Let comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv
        (x y : C)
      : G (F (x ⊗_{ M } y)) --> G (F x) ⊗_{ O } G (F y)
      := #G (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm x y))
         · pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Gm (F x) (F y)).

    
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
Gm: fmonoidal N O G
comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
x, y: C
is_inverse_in_precat
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax Fm Gm) x y)
  (comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv x y)

    
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
Gm: fmonoidal N O G
comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
x, y: C
is_inverse_in_precat
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax Fm Gm) x y)
  (comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv x y)

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
Gm: fmonoidal N O G
comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
x, y: C
is_inverse_in_precat
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax Fm Gm) x y)
  (# G
     (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm x y))
   · pr1
       (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Gm (F x)
          (F y)))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
Gm: fmonoidal N O G
comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
x, y: C
fmonoidal_preservestensordata
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax Fm Gm) x y
· (# G
     (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm x y))
   · pr1
       (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Gm (F x)
          (F y))) =
identity ((F ∙ G) x ⊗_{ O} (F ∙ G) y)
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
Gm: fmonoidal N O G
comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
x, y: C
# G (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Gm (F x) (F y))
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata
    (comp_fmonoidal_lax Fm Gm) x y =
identity ((F ∙ G) (x ⊗_{ M} y))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
Gm: fmonoidal N O G
comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
x, y: C
fmonoidal_preservestensordata
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax Fm Gm) x y
· (# G
     (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm x y))
   · pr1
       (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Gm (F x)
          (F y))) =
identity ((F ∙ G) x ⊗_{ O} (F ∙ G) y)
 
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
Gm: fmonoidal N O G
comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
x, y: C
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (F x) (F y)
· # G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y)
· (# G
     (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm x y))
   · pr1
       (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Gm (F x)
          (F y))) = identity (G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y))

        
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
Gm: fmonoidal N O G
comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
x, y: C
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (F x) (F y)
· # G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y)
· (# G
     (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm x y))
   · pr1
       (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Gm (F x)
          (F y))) = ?b
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
Gm: fmonoidal N O G
comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
x, y: C
?b = identity (G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y))

        
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
Gm: fmonoidal N O G
comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
x, y: C
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (F x) (F y)
· # G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y)
· (# G
     (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm x y))
   · pr1
       (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Gm (F x)
          (F y))) = ?b

          
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
Gm: fmonoidal N O G
comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
x, y: C
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (F x) (F y)
· (# G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y)
   · (# G
        (pr1
           (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm x y))
      · pr1
          (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Gm (F x)
             (F y)))) = ?b

          
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
Gm: fmonoidal N O G
comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
x, y: C
# G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y)
· (# G
     (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm x y))
   · pr1
       (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Gm (F x)
          (F y))) = ?t2

          
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
Gm: fmonoidal N O G
comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
x, y: C
# G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y)
· # G (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Gm (F x) (F y)) =
?t2

          
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
Gm: fmonoidal N O G
comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
x, y: C
# G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y)
· # G (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm x y)) =
?f'

N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E

G: D ⟶ E

comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
x, y: C
# G
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y
   · pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm x y)) =
?f'

N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E

G: D ⟶ E

· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
x, y: C
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (F x) (F y)
· (# G (identity (F x ⊗_{ N} F y))
   · pr1
       (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Gm (F x)
          (F y))) = identity (G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y))

fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (F x) (F y)
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Gm (F x) (F y)) =
identity (G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y))

        apply (pr12 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Gm (F x) (F y))).

M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E

G: D ⟶ E

# G

· pr1

       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
x, y: C
# G (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Gm (F x) (F y))
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata
    (comp_fmonoidal_lax Fm Gm) x y =
identity ((F ∙ G) (x ⊗_{ M} y))

M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
Gm: fmonoidal N O G
comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
x, y: C
# G (identity (F (x ⊗_{ M} y))) =
identity (G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)))

        apply functor_id.
    Qed.

    
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
Gm: fmonoidal N O G
comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit (comp_fmonoidal_lax Fm Gm))
  comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv

    
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
Gm: fmonoidal N O G
comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit (comp_fmonoidal_lax Fm Gm))
  comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
Gm: fmonoidal N O G
comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit (comp_fmonoidal_lax Fm Gm))
  (# G (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm))
   · pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Gm))

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
Gm: fmonoidal N O G
comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
fmonoidal_preservesunit (comp_fmonoidal_lax Fm Gm)
· (# G (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm))
   · pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Gm)) =
identity I_{ O}
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
Gm: fmonoidal N O G
comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
# G (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm))
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Gm)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit (comp_fmonoidal_lax Fm Gm) =
identity ((F ∙ G) I_{ M})

G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧

· (# G (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm))

       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,

fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm
· # G (fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm)
· (# G (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm))
   · pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Gm)) =

· # G (fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm)
· (# G (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm))
   · pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Gm)) = ?b

       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),

# G (fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm)
· # G (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)) =

   · pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)) = ?f'

· pr1

       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm) = ?t2

          apply (pr12 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)).

M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E

G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm
· (# G (identity I_{ N})
   · pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Gm)) =

fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm
· (identity (G I_{ N})
   · pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Gm)) =
identity I_{ O}

G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧

· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Gm) =

        apply (pr12 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Gm)).

M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E

G: D ⟶ E

· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
# G (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm))
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Gm)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit (comp_fmonoidal_lax Fm Gm) =

M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E

Gm: fmonoidal N O G
comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G

· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
# G (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm))
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Gm)
· (fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm
   · # G (fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm)) =
identity (G (F I_{ M}))

G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧

· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Gm)
· (fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm
   · # G (fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm)) = ?b

# G (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm))
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Gm)
· (fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm
   · # G (fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm)) = ?b

          
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
Gm: fmonoidal N O G
comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
# G (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm))
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Gm)
   · (fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm
      · # G (fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm))) = ?b

· pr1

# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Gm)
· (fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm
   · # G (fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm)) = ?t2

G: D ⟶ E

# G
  (pr1

· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Gm)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm = ?f'

          apply (pr22 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Gm)).
        
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal M N F

comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G

E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
# G (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm))
· (identity (G I_{ N})
   · # G (fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm)) =
identity (G (F I_{ M}))

E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),

        apply functor_id.
    Qed.

O: monoidal E

  (pr1

       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
fmonoidal_stronglaws
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax Fm Gm))
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit (comp_fmonoidal_lax Fm Gm))

O: monoidal E

G: D ⟶ E

       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
x, y: C
is_z_isomorphism
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax Fm Gm) x y)

O: monoidal E

# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
x, y: C
E ⟦ (F ∙ G) (x ⊗_{ M} y), (F ∙ G) x ⊗_{ O} (F ∙ G) y ⟧
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E

  (pr1

        Fm))

       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧

# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
x, y: C
is_inverse_in_precat
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax Fm Gm) x y) 
  ?g

        
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
Gm: fmonoidal N O G
comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
x, y: C
E ⟦ (F ∙ G) (x ⊗_{ M} y), (F ∙ G) x ⊗_{ O} (F ∙ G) y ⟧
 exact (comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv x y).
        
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
Gm: fmonoidal N O G
comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
x, y: C
is_inverse_in_precat
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
     (comp_fmonoidal_lax Fm Gm) x y)
  (comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv x y)
 exact (comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv_laws x y).

  (fmonoidal_preservesunit (comp_fmonoidal_lax Fm Gm))

C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
