  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit (comp_fmonoidal_lax Fm Gm))
  ?g

        
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
Gm: fmonoidal N O G
comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
E ⟦ (F ∙ G) I_{ M}, I_{ O} ⟧
 exact comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv.
        
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
Fm: fmonoidal M N F
Gm: fmonoidal N O G
comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv:= # G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        Fm))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
       Gm): E ⟦ G (F I_{ M}), I_{ O} ⟧
comp_fmonoidal_tensor_inv:= λ x y : C,
# G
  (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        Fm x y))
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
       Gm (F x) 
       (F y)): ∏ x y : C,
E ⟦ G (F (x ⊗_{ M} y)),
G (F x) ⊗_{ O} G (F y) ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit (comp_fmonoidal_lax Fm Gm))
  comp_fmnoidal_unit_inv
 exact comp_fmonoidal_unit_inv_laws.
    Defined.

    Definition comp_fmonoidal
      : fmonoidal M O (F ∙ G)
      := comp_fmonoidal_lax Fm Gm ,, comp_fmonoidal_stronglaws.
  End CompStrongMonoidal.

  
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
HM: symmetric M
HN: symmetric N
HO: symmetric O
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
HF: fmonoidal_lax M N F
HG: fmonoidal_lax N O G
HHF: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HM HN HF
HHG: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HN HO HG
is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HM HO
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax HF HG)

  
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
HM: symmetric M
HN: symmetric N
HO: symmetric O
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
HF: fmonoidal_lax M N F
HG: fmonoidal_lax N O G
HHF: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HM HN HF
HHG: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HN HO HG
is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HM HO
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax HF HG)

    
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
HM: symmetric M
HN: symmetric N
HO: symmetric O
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
HF: fmonoidal_lax M N F
HG: fmonoidal_lax N O G
HHF: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HM HN HF
HHG: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HN HO HG
x, y: C
HO ((F ∙ G) x) ((F ∙ G) y)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata
    (comp_fmonoidal_lax HF HG) y x =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax HF HG) x y · # (F ∙ G) (HM x y)

    
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
HM: symmetric M
HN: symmetric N
HO: symmetric O
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
HF: fmonoidal_lax M N F
HG: fmonoidal_lax N O G
HHF: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HM HN HF
HHG: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HN HO HG
x, y: C
pr1 HO (G (F x)) (G (F y))
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HG (F y) (F x)
   · # G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF y x)) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HG (F x) (F y)
· # G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF x y)
· # G (# F (pr1 HM x y))

    
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
HM: symmetric M
HN: symmetric N
HO: symmetric O
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
HF: fmonoidal_lax M N F
HG: fmonoidal_lax N O G
HHF: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HM HN HF
HHG: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HN HO HG
x, y: C
pr1 HO (G (F x)) (G (F y))
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HG (F y) (F x)
· # G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF y x) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HG (F x) (F y)
· # G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF x y)
· # G (# F (pr1 HM x y))

    
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
HM: symmetric M
HN: symmetric N
HO: symmetric O
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
HF: fmonoidal_lax M N F
HG: fmonoidal_lax N O G
HHF: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HM HN HF
HHG: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HN HO HG
x, y: C
pr1 HO (G (F x)) (G (F y))
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HG (F y) (F x)
· # G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF y x) = ?b
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
HM: symmetric M
HN: symmetric N
HO: symmetric O
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
HF: fmonoidal_lax M N F
HG: fmonoidal_lax N O G
HHF: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HM HN HF
HHG: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HN HO HG
x, y: C
?b =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HG (F x) (F y)
· # G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF x y)
· # G (# F (pr1 HM x y))

    
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
HM: symmetric M
HN: symmetric N
HO: symmetric O
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
HF: fmonoidal_lax M N F
HG: fmonoidal_lax N O G
HHF: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HM HN HF
HHG: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HN HO HG
x, y: C
pr1 HO (G (F x)) (G (F y))
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HG (F y) (F x)
· # G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF y x) = ?b

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
HM: symmetric M
HN: symmetric N
HO: symmetric O
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
HF: fmonoidal_lax M N F
HG: fmonoidal_lax N O G
HHF: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HM HN HF
HHG: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HN HO HG
x, y: C
pr1 HO (G (F x)) (G (F y))
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata HG (F y) (F x) = ?y'

      apply HHG.
    
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
HM: symmetric M
HN: symmetric N
HO: symmetric O
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
HF: fmonoidal_lax M N F
HG: fmonoidal_lax N O G
HHF: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HM HN HF
HHG: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HN HO HG
x, y: C
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HG (F x) (F y)
· # G (HN (F x) (F y))
· # G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF y x) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HG (F x) (F y)
· # G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF x y)
· # G (# F (pr1 HM x y))

    
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
HM: symmetric M
HN: symmetric N
HO: symmetric O
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
HF: fmonoidal_lax M N F
HG: fmonoidal_lax N O G
HHF: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HM HN HF
HHG: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HN HO HG
x, y: C
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HG (F x) (F y)
· (# G (HN (F x) (F y))
   · # G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF y x)) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HG (F x) (F y)
· (# G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF x y)
   · # G (# F (pr1 HM x y)))

    
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
HM: symmetric M
HN: symmetric N
HO: symmetric O
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
HF: fmonoidal_lax M N F
HG: fmonoidal_lax N O G
HHF: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HM HN HF
HHG: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HN HO HG
x, y: C
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HG (F x) (F y)
· (# G (HN (F x) (F y))
   · # G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF y x)) = 
?b
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
HM: symmetric M
HN: symmetric N
HO: symmetric O
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
HF: fmonoidal_lax M N F
HG: fmonoidal_lax N O G
HHF: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HM HN HF
HHG: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HN HO HG
x, y: C
?b =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HG (F x) (F y)
· (# G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF x y)
   · # G (# F (pr1 HM x y)))

    
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
HM: symmetric M
HN: symmetric N
HO: symmetric O
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
HF: fmonoidal_lax M N F
HG: fmonoidal_lax N O G
HHF: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HM HN HF
HHG: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HN HO HG
x, y: C
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HG (F x) (F y)
· (# G (HN (F x) (F y))
   · # G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF y x)) = 
?b

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
HM: symmetric M
HN: symmetric N
HO: symmetric O
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
HF: fmonoidal_lax M N F
HG: fmonoidal_lax N O G
HHF: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HM HN HF
HHG: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HN HO HG
x, y: C
# G (HN (F x) (F y))
· # G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF y x) = ?t2

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
HM: symmetric M
HN: symmetric N
HO: symmetric O
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
HF: fmonoidal_lax M N F
HG: fmonoidal_lax N O G
HHF: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HM HN HF
HHG: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HN HO HG
x, y: C
# G
  (HN (F x) (F y)
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF y x) = ?t2

      
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
HM: symmetric M
HN: symmetric N
HO: symmetric O
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
HF: fmonoidal_lax M N F
HG: fmonoidal_lax N O G
HHF: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HM HN HF
HHG: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HN HO HG
x, y: C
HN (F x) (F y) · fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF y x =
?t2

      apply HHF.
    
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
HM: symmetric M
HN: symmetric N
HO: symmetric O
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
HF: fmonoidal_lax M N F
HG: fmonoidal_lax N O G
HHF: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HM HN HF
HHG: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HN HO HG
x, y: C
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HG (F x) (F y)
· # G
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF x y
     · # F (HM x y)) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HG (F x) (F y)
· (# G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF x y)
   · # G (# F (pr1 HM x y)))

    
C, D, E: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
O: monoidal E
HM: symmetric M
HN: symmetric N
HO: symmetric O
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
HF: fmonoidal_lax M N F
HG: fmonoidal_lax N O G
HHF: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HM HN HF
HHG: is_symmetric_monoidal_functor HN HO HG
x, y: C
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HG (F x) (F y)
· (# G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF x y)
   · # G (# F (HM x y))) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HG (F x) (F y)
· (# G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF x y)
   · # G (# F (pr1 HM x y)))

    apply idpath.
  Qed.
End MonoidalFunctors.

(**
 7. Monoidal natural transformations
 *)
Section MonoidalNaturalTransformations.

  Context {C D : category}
          {M : monoidal C} {N : monoidal D}
          {F G : functor C D}
          (Fm : fmonoidal_lax M N F) (Gm : fmonoidal_lax M N G)
          (α : F ⟹ G).

  Definition is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw
    : UU
    := ∏ (a a' : C),
       fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a' · α (a ⊗_{M} a')
       =
       α a ⊗^{N} α a' · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a'.

  Definition is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw : UU
    := fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm · α I_{M} = fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm.

  Definition is_mon_nat_trans : UU := is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw × is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw.

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
α: F ⟹ G
isaprop is_mon_nat_trans

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
α: F ⟹ G
isaprop is_mon_nat_trans

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
α: F ⟹ G
isaprop is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
α: F ⟹ G
isaprop is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
α: F ⟹ G
isaprop is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw
 
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
α: F ⟹ G
a, a': C
isofhlevel 1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a'
   · α (a ⊗_{ M} a') =
   α a ⊗^{ N} α a'
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a')

      apply D.
    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
α: F ⟹ G
isaprop is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw
 apply D.
  Qed.

End MonoidalNaturalTransformations.

Section SomeMonoidalNaturalTransformations.

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
is_mon_nat_trans Fm Fm (nat_trans_id F)

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
is_mon_nat_trans Fm Fm (nat_trans_id F)

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
a, a': C
pr1 Fm a a' · identity (F (a ⊗_{ M} a')) =
identity (F a) ⊗^{ N} identity (F a') · pr1 Fm a a'
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
pr2 Fm · identity (F I_{ M}) = pr2 Fm

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
a, a': C
pr1 Fm a a' · identity (F (a ⊗_{ M} a')) =
identity (F a) ⊗^{ N} identity (F a') · pr1 Fm a a'
 
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
a, a': C
pr1 Fm a a' · identity (F (a ⊗_{ M} a')) = ?b
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
a, a': C
?b =
identity (F a) ⊗^{ N} identity (F a') · pr1 Fm a a'

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
a, a': C
?b =
identity (F a) ⊗^{ N} identity (F a') · pr1 Fm a a'
 
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
a, a': C
?f = identity (F a) ⊗^{ N} identity (F a')

           
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
a, a': C
bifunctor_leftidax N
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
a, a': C
bifunctor_rightidax N

           
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
a, a': C
bifunctor_leftidax N
 
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
a, a': C
bifunctor_leftidax N

             apply (bifunctor_leftid N).
           
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
a, a': C
bifunctor_rightidax N
 
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
a, a': C
bifunctor_rightidax N

             apply (bifunctor_rightid N).
      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
a, a': C
pr1 Fm a a' · identity (F (a ⊗_{ M} a')) =
identity (F a ⊗_{ N} F a') · pr1 Fm a a'

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
a, a': C
pr1 Fm a a' · identity (F (a ⊗_{ M} a')) = pr1 Fm a a'

      apply id_right.
    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
pr2 Fm · identity (F I_{ M}) = pr2 Fm
 apply id_right.
  Qed.

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
Hm: fmonoidal_lax M N H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
→ is_mon_nat_trans Gm Hm β
  → is_mon_nat_trans Fm Hm (nat_trans_comp F G H α β)

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
Hm: fmonoidal_lax M N H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
→ is_mon_nat_trans Gm Hm β
  → is_mon_nat_trans Fm Hm (nat_trans_comp F G H α β)

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
Hm: fmonoidal_lax M N H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
Hα: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
Hβ: is_mon_nat_trans Gm Hm β
is_mon_nat_trans Fm Hm (nat_trans_comp F G H α β)

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
Hm: fmonoidal_lax M N H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
Hα: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
Hβ: is_mon_nat_trans Gm Hm β
a, a': C
pr1 Fm a a' · (α (a ⊗_{ M} a') · β (a ⊗_{ M} a')) =
(α a · β a) ⊗^{ N} (α a' · β a') · pr1 Hm a a'
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
Hm: fmonoidal_lax M N H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
Hα: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
Hβ: is_mon_nat_trans Gm Hm β
pr2 Fm · (α I_{ M} · β I_{ M}) = pr2 Hm

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
Hm: fmonoidal_lax M N H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
Hα: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
Hβ: is_mon_nat_trans Gm Hm β
a, a': C
pr1 Fm a a' · (α (a ⊗_{ M} a') · β (a ⊗_{ M} a')) =
(α a · β a) ⊗^{ N} (α a' · β a') · pr1 Hm a a'

M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
Hm: fmonoidal_lax M N H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
Hα: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
Hβ: is_mon_nat_trans Gm Hm β
a, a': C
pr1 Fm a a' · (α (a ⊗_{ M} a') · β (a ⊗_{ M} a')) = ?b

α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
Hα: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
Hβ: is_mon_nat_trans Gm Hm β
a, a': C
?b = (α a · β a) ⊗^{ N} (α a' · β a') · pr1 Hm a a'

C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D

α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H

Hβ: is_mon_nat_trans Gm Hm β
a, a': C
pr1 Fm a a' · (α (a ⊗_{ M} a') · β (a ⊗_{ M} a')) =
α a ⊗^{ N} α a' · β a ⊗^{ N} β a' · pr1 Hm a a'

a, a': C
pr1 Fm a a' · α (a ⊗_{ M} a') · β (a ⊗_{ M} a') = ?b

M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D

C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D

Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
Hm: fmonoidal_lax M N H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H

a, a': C

C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
Hm: fmonoidal_lax M N H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
Hα: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
Hβ: is_mon_nat_trans Gm Hm β
a, a': C
pr1 Fm a a' · α (a ⊗_{ M} a') = ?f'

        apply (pr1 Hα a a'). 
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
Hm: fmonoidal_lax M N H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
Hα: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
Hβ: is_mon_nat_trans Gm Hm β
a, a': C
α a ⊗^{ N} α a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a'
· β (a ⊗_{ M} a') =
α a ⊗^{ N} α a' · β a ⊗^{ N} β a' · pr1 Hm a a'

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
Hm: fmonoidal_lax M N H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
Hα: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
Hβ: is_mon_nat_trans Gm Hm β
a, a': C
α a ⊗^{ N} α a'
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a'
   · β (a ⊗_{ M} a')) =
α a ⊗^{ N} α a' · (β a ⊗^{ N} β a' · pr1 Hm a a')

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
Hm: fmonoidal_lax M N H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
Hα: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
Hβ: is_mon_nat_trans Gm Hm β
a, a': C
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a'
· β (a ⊗_{ M} a') = β a ⊗^{ N} β a' · pr1 Hm a a'

      apply (pr1 Hβ).
    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
Hm: fmonoidal_lax M N H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
Hα: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
Hβ: is_mon_nat_trans Gm Hm β
pr2 Fm · (α I_{ M} · β I_{ M}) = pr2 Hm
 
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
Hm: fmonoidal_lax M N H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
Hα: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
Hβ: is_mon_nat_trans Gm Hm β
pr2 Fm · α I_{ M} · β I_{ M} = pr2 Hm

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
Hm: fmonoidal_lax M N H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
Hα: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
Hβ: is_mon_nat_trans Gm Hm β
pr2 Fm · α I_{ M} · β I_{ M} = ?b
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
Hm: fmonoidal_lax M N H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
Hα: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
Hβ: is_mon_nat_trans Gm Hm β
?b = pr2 Hm

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
Hm: fmonoidal_lax M N H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
Hα: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
Hβ: is_mon_nat_trans Gm Hm β
pr2 Fm · α I_{ M} · β I_{ M} = ?b
 
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
Hm: fmonoidal_lax M N H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
Hα: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
Hβ: is_mon_nat_trans Gm Hm β
pr2 Fm · α I_{ M} = ?f'

        apply (pr2 Hα). 
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G, H: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
Hm: fmonoidal_lax M N H
α: F ⟹ G
β: G ⟹ H
Hα: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
Hβ: is_mon_nat_trans Gm Hm β
fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm · β I_{ M} = pr2 Hm

      apply (pr2 Hβ).
  Qed.

End SomeMonoidalNaturalTransformations.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal_lax HF HG₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax HF HG₂) (pre_whisker F τ)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal_lax HF HG₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax HF HG₂) (pre_whisker F τ)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw (comp_fmonoidal_lax HF HG₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax HF HG₂) (pre_whisker F τ)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw (comp_fmonoidal_lax HF HG₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax HF HG₂) (pre_whisker F τ)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw (comp_fmonoidal_lax HF HG₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax HF HG₂) (pre_whisker F τ)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
x, y: C₁
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HG₁ (F x) (F y)
· # G₁ (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF x y)
· pr1 τ (pr1 F (x ⊗_{ M₁} y)) =
pr1 τ (pr1 F x) ⊗^{ M₃} pr1 τ (pr1 F y)
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HG₂ (F x) (F y)
   · # G₂ (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF x y))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
x, y: C₁
pr1 HG₁ (F x) (F y) · # G₁ (pr1 HF x y)
· pr1 τ (pr1 F (x ⊗_{ M₁} y)) =
pr1 τ (pr1 F x) ⊗^{ M₃} pr1 τ (pr1 F y)
· (pr1 HG₂ (F x) (F y) · # G₂ (pr1 HF x y))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
x, y: C₁
aux: fmonoidal_preservestensordata HG₁ (F x) (F y) · τ (F x ⊗_{ M₂} F y) =
τ (F x) ⊗^{ M₃} τ (F y) · fmonoidal_preservestensordata HG₂ (F x) (F y)
pr1 HG₁ (F x) (F y) · # G₁ (pr1 HF x y)
· pr1 τ (pr1 F (x ⊗_{ M₁} y)) =
pr1 τ (pr1 F x) ⊗^{ M₃} pr1 τ (pr1 F y)
· (pr1 HG₂ (F x) (F y) · # G₂ (pr1 HF x y))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
x, y: C₁
aux: pr1 HG₁ (F x) (F y) · τ (F x ⊗_{ M₂} F y) =
τ (F x) ⊗^{ M₃} τ (F y) · pr1 HG₂ (F x) (F y)
pr1 HG₁ (F x) (F y) · # G₁ (pr1 HF x y)
· pr1 τ (pr1 F (x ⊗_{ M₁} y)) =
pr1 τ (pr1 F x) ⊗^{ M₃} pr1 τ (pr1 F y)
· (pr1 HG₂ (F x) (F y) · # G₂ (pr1 HF x y))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
x, y: C₁
aux: pr1 HG₁ (F x) (F y) · τ (F x ⊗_{ M₂} F y) =
τ (F x) ⊗^{ M₃} τ (F y) · pr1 HG₂ (F x) (F y)
pr1 HG₁ (F x) (F y) · # G₁ (pr1 HF x y)
· pr1 τ (pr1 F (x ⊗_{ M₁} y)) = ?b
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
x, y: C₁
aux: pr1 HG₁ (F x) (F y) · τ (F x ⊗_{ M₂} F y) =
τ (F x) ⊗^{ M₃} τ (F y) · pr1 HG₂ (F x) (F y)
?b =
pr1 τ (pr1 F x) ⊗^{ M₃} pr1 τ (pr1 F y)
· (pr1 HG₂ (F x) (F y) · # G₂ (pr1 HF x y))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
x, y: C₁
aux: pr1 HG₁ (F x) (F y) · τ (F x ⊗_{ M₂} F y) =
τ (F x) ⊗^{ M₃} τ (F y) · pr1 HG₂ (F x) (F y)
?b =
pr1 τ (pr1 F x) ⊗^{ M₃} pr1 τ (pr1 F y)
· (pr1 HG₂ (F x) (F y) · # G₂ (pr1 HF x y))
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
x, y: C₁
aux: pr1 HG₁ (F x) (F y) · τ (F x ⊗_{ M₂} F y) =
τ (F x) ⊗^{ M₃} τ (F y) · pr1 HG₂ (F x) (F y)
?b =
pr1 τ (pr1 F x) ⊗^{ M₃} pr1 τ (pr1 F y)
· pr1 HG₂ (F x) (F y) · # G₂ (pr1 HF x y)

         
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
x, y: C₁
aux: pr1 HG₁ (F x) (F y) · τ (F x ⊗_{ M₂} F y) =
τ (F x) ⊗^{ M₃} τ (F y) · pr1 HG₂ (F x) (F y)
?f =
pr1 τ (pr1 F x) ⊗^{ M₃} pr1 τ (pr1 F y)
· pr1 HG₂ (F x) (F y)

         exact aux. 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
x, y: C₁
aux: pr1 HG₁ (F x) (F y) · τ (F x ⊗_{ M₂} F y) =
τ (F x) ⊗^{ M₃} τ (F y) · pr1 HG₂ (F x) (F y)
pr1 HG₁ (F x) (F y) · # G₁ (pr1 HF x y)
· pr1 τ (pr1 F (x ⊗_{ M₁} y)) =
pr1 HG₁ (F x) (F y) · τ (F x ⊗_{ M₂} F y)
· # G₂ (pr1 HF x y)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
x, y: C₁
pr1 HG₁ (F x) (F y) · # G₁ (pr1 HF x y)
· pr1 τ (pr1 F (x ⊗_{ M₁} y)) =
pr1 HG₁ (F x) (F y) · τ (F x ⊗_{ M₂} F y)
· # G₂ (pr1 HF x y)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
x, y: C₁
pr1 HG₁ (F x) (F y)
· (# G₁ (pr1 HF x y) · pr1 τ (pr1 F (x ⊗_{ M₁} y))) =
pr1 HG₁ (F x) (F y)
· (τ (F x ⊗_{ M₂} F y) · # G₂ (pr1 HF x y))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
x, y: C₁
# G₁ (pr1 HF x y) · pr1 τ (pr1 F (x ⊗_{ M₁} y)) =
τ (F x ⊗_{ M₂} F y) · # G₂ (pr1 HF x y)

    apply nat_trans_ax.
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw (comp_fmonoidal_lax HF HG₁)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax HF HG₂) (pre_whisker F τ)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
fmonoidal_preservesunit HG₁
· # G₁ (fmonoidal_preservesunit HF)
· pr1 τ (pr1 F I_{ M₁}) =
fmonoidal_preservesunit HG₂
· # G₂ (fmonoidal_preservesunit HF)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
pr2 HG₁ · # G₁ (pr2 HF) · pr1 τ (pr1 F I_{ M₁}) =
pr2 HG₂ · # G₂ (pr2 HF)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
aux: (λ _ : is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw HG₁ HG₂ τ,
is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw HG₁ HG₂ τ) (pr1 Hτ)
pr2 HG₁ · # G₁ (pr2 HF) · pr1 τ (pr1 F I_{ M₁}) =
pr2 HG₂ · # G₂ (pr2 HF)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
aux: fmonoidal_preservesunit HG₁ · τ I_{ M₂} = fmonoidal_preservesunit HG₂
pr2 HG₁ · # G₁ (pr2 HF) · pr1 τ (pr1 F I_{ M₁}) =
pr2 HG₂ · # G₂ (pr2 HF)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
aux: pr2 HG₁ · τ I_{ M₂} = pr2 HG₂
pr2 HG₁ · # G₁ (pr2 HF) · pr1 τ (pr1 F I_{ M₁}) =
pr2 HG₂ · # G₂ (pr2 HF)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
aux: pr2 HG₁ · τ I_{ M₂} = pr2 HG₂
pr2 HG₁ · # G₁ (pr2 HF) · pr1 τ (pr1 F I_{ M₁}) =
pr2 HG₁ · τ I_{ M₂} · # G₂ (pr2 HF)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
aux: pr2 HG₁ · τ I_{ M₂} = pr2 HG₂
pr2 HG₁ · (# G₁ (pr2 HF) · pr1 τ (pr1 F I_{ M₁})) =
pr2 HG₁ · (τ I_{ M₂} · # G₂ (pr2 HF))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG₁: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₁
HG₂: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G₂
τ: G₁ ⟹ G₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HG₁ HG₂ τ
aux: pr2 HG₁ · τ I_{ M₂} = pr2 HG₂
# G₁ (pr2 HF) · pr1 τ (pr1 F I_{ M₁}) =
τ I_{ M₂} · # G₂ (pr2 HF)

    apply nat_trans_ax.
Qed.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal_lax HF₁ HG)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax HF₂ HG) (post_whisker τ G)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂

HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal_lax HF₁ HG)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax HF₂ HG) (post_whisker τ G)

M₃: monoidal C₃

  (comp_fmonoidal_lax HF₂ HG) (post_whisker τ G)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃

HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

  (comp_fmonoidal_lax HF₂ HG) (post_whisker τ G)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw (comp_fmonoidal_lax HF₁ HG)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax HF₂ HG) (post_whisker τ G)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
x, y: C₁
fmonoidal_preservestensordata HG (F₁ x) (F₁ y)
· # G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF₁ x y)
· # (pr1 G) (pr1 τ (x ⊗_{ M₁} y)) =
# (pr1 G) (pr1 τ x) ⊗^{ M₃} # (pr1 G) (pr1 τ y)
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HG (F₂ x) (F₂ y)
   · # G (fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF₂ x y))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
x, y: C₁
pr1 HG (F₁ x) (F₁ y) · # G (pr1 HF₁ x y)
· # (pr1 G) (pr1 τ (x ⊗_{ M₁} y)) =
# (pr1 G) (pr1 τ x) ⊗^{ M₃} # (pr1 G) (pr1 τ y)
· (pr1 HG (F₂ x) (F₂ y) · # G (pr1 HF₂ x y))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
x, y: C₁
pr1 HG (F₁ x) (F₁ y) · # G (pr1 HF₁ x y)
· # (pr1 G) (pr1 τ (x ⊗_{ M₁} y)) = ?b
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
x, y: C₁
?b =
# (pr1 G) (pr1 τ x) ⊗^{ M₃} # (pr1 G) (pr1 τ y)
· (pr1 HG (F₂ x) (F₂ y) · # G (pr1 HF₂ x y))

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
x, y: C₁
pr1 HG (F₁ x) (F₁ y) · # G (pr1 HF₁ x y)
· # (pr1 G) (pr1 τ (x ⊗_{ M₁} y)) = ?b
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
x, y: C₁
pr1 HG (F₁ x) (F₁ y)
· (# G (pr1 HF₁ x y) · # (pr1 G) (pr1 τ (x ⊗_{ M₁} y))) =
?b

        
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
x, y: C₁
# G (pr1 HF₁ x y) · # (pr1 G) (pr1 τ (x ⊗_{ M₁} y)) =
?t2

        apply pathsinv0, functor_comp. 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
x, y: C₁
pr1 HG (F₁ x) (F₁ y)
· # G (pr1 HF₁ x y · pr1 τ (x ⊗_{ M₁} y)) =
# (pr1 G) (pr1 τ x) ⊗^{ M₃} # (pr1 G) (pr1 τ y)
· (pr1 HG (F₂ x) (F₂ y) · # G (pr1 HF₂ x y))

HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
x, y: C₁
pr1 HG (F₁ x) (F₁ y)
· # G (pr1 HF₁ x y · pr1 τ (x ⊗_{ M₁} y)) = ?b
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
x, y: C₁
?b =
# (pr1 G) (pr1 τ x) ⊗^{ M₃} # (pr1 G) (pr1 τ y)
· (pr1 HG (F₂ x) (F₂ y) · # G (pr1 HF₂ x y))

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category

M₃: monoidal C₃

Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
x, y: C₁
pr1 HG (F₁ x) (F₁ y)
· # G (pr1 HF₁ x y · pr1 τ (x ⊗_{ M₁} y)) = ?b
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
x, y: C₁
pr1 HF₁ x y · pr1 τ (x ⊗_{ M₁} y) = ?t2

        apply (pr1 Hτ).
      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
x, y: C₁
pr1 HG (F₁ x) (F₁ y)
· # G
    (τ x ⊗^{ M₂} τ y
     · fmonoidal_preservestensordata HF₂ x y) =
# (pr1 G) (pr1 τ x) ⊗^{ M₃} # (pr1 G) (pr1 τ y)
· (pr1 HG (F₂ x) (F₂ y) · # G (pr1 HF₂ x y))

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
x, y: C₁
pr1 HG (F₁ x) (F₁ y)
· # G (τ x ⊗^{ M₂} τ y · pr1 HF₂ x y) =
# (pr1 G) (pr1 τ x) ⊗^{ M₃} # (pr1 G) (pr1 τ y)
· (pr1 HG (F₂ x) (F₂ y) · # G (pr1 HF₂ x y))

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
x, y: C₁
pr1 HG (F₁ x) (F₁ y)
· (# G (τ x ⊗^{ M₂} τ y) · # G (pr1 HF₂ x y)) =
# (pr1 G) (pr1 τ x) ⊗^{ M₃} # (pr1 G) (pr1 τ y)
· (pr1 HG (F₂ x) (F₂ y) · # G (pr1 HF₂ x y))

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
x, y: C₁
pr1 HG (F₁ x) (F₁ y) · # G (τ x ⊗^{ M₂} τ y)
· # G (pr1 HF₂ x y) =
# (pr1 G) (pr1 τ x) ⊗^{ M₃} # (pr1 G) (pr1 τ y)
· pr1 HG (F₂ x) (F₂ y) · # G (pr1 HF₂ x y)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
x, y: C₁
pr1 HG (F₁ x) (F₁ y) · # G (τ x ⊗^{ M₂} τ y) =
# (pr1 G) (pr1 τ x) ⊗^{ M₃} # (pr1 G) (pr1 τ y)
· pr1 HG (F₂ x) (F₂ y)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
x, y: C₁
preserves_tensor_nat_left (pr1 HG)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
x, y: C₁
preserves_tensor_nat_right (pr1 HG)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
x, y: C₁
preserves_tensor_nat_left (pr1 HG)
 apply (fmonoidal_preservestensornatleft HG).
      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
x, y: C₁
preserves_tensor_nat_right (pr1 HG)
 apply (fmonoidal_preservestensornatright HG).
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw (comp_fmonoidal_lax HF₁ HG)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax HF₂ HG) (post_whisker τ G)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
fmonoidal_preservesunit HG
· # G (fmonoidal_preservesunit HF₁)
· # (pr1 G) (pr1 τ I_{ M₁}) =
fmonoidal_preservesunit HG
· # G (fmonoidal_preservesunit HF₂)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
pr2 HG · # G (pr2 HF₁) · # (pr1 G) (pr1 τ I_{ M₁}) =
pr2 HG · # G (pr2 HF₂)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
pr2 HG · (# G (pr2 HF₁) · # (pr1 G) (pr1 τ I_{ M₁})) =
pr2 HG · # G (pr2 HF₂)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
# G (pr2 HF₁) · # (pr1 G) (pr1 τ I_{ M₁}) =
# G (pr2 HF₂)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
# G (pr2 HF₁) · # (pr1 G) (pr1 τ I_{ M₁}) = ?b
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
?b = # G (pr2 HF₂)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
# G (pr2 HF₁) · # (pr1 G) (pr1 τ I_{ M₁}) = ?b
 apply pathsinv0, functor_comp. 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
# G (pr2 HF₁ · pr1 τ I_{ M₁}) = # G (pr2 HF₂)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
M₁: monoidal C₁
M₂: monoidal C₂
M₃: monoidal C₃
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF₁: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₁
HF₂: fmonoidal_lax M₁ M₂ F₂
τ: F₁ ⟹ F₂
Hτ: is_mon_nat_trans HF₁ HF₂ τ
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
HG: fmonoidal_lax M₂ M₃ G
pr2 HF₁ · pr1 τ I_{ M₁} = pr2 HF₂

    apply (pr2 Hτ).
Qed.

(**
 8. Inverses of monoidal natural transformations
 *)
Section InverseMonoidalNaturalTransformation.
  Context {C D : category}
          {M : monoidal C} {N : monoidal D}
          {F G : functor C D}
          (Fm : fmonoidal_lax M N F) (Gm : fmonoidal_lax M N G)
          (α : F ⟹ G).

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
α: F ⟹ G
isnziα: is_nat_z_iso α
is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
→ is_mon_nat_trans Gm Fm (nat_z_iso_inv (α,, isnziα))

  
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
α: F ⟹ G
isnziα: is_nat_z_iso α
is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
→ is_mon_nat_trans Gm Fm (nat_z_iso_inv (α,, isnziα))

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
α: F ⟹ G
isnziα: is_nat_z_iso α
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
is_mon_nat_trans Gm Fm (nat_z_iso_inv (α,, isnziα))
 
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
α: F ⟹ G
isnziα: is_nat_z_iso α
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Gm Fm
  (nat_z_iso_inv (α,, isnziα))
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
α: F ⟹ G
isnziα: is_nat_z_iso α
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Gm Fm
  (nat_z_iso_inv (α,, isnziα))

    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
α: F ⟹ G
isnziα: is_nat_z_iso α
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Gm Fm
  (nat_z_iso_inv (α,, isnziα))
 
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
α: F ⟹ G
isnziα: is_nat_z_iso α
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
x, y: C
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm x y
· nat_z_iso_inv (α,, isnziα) (x ⊗_{ M} y) =
nat_z_iso_inv (α,, isnziα) x
⊗^{ N} nat_z_iso_inv (α,, isnziα) y
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
α: F ⟹ G
isnziα: is_nat_z_iso α
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
x, y: C
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm x y
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (isnziα (x ⊗_{ M} y)) =
is_z_isomorphism_mor (isnziα x)
⊗^{ N} is_z_isomorphism_mor (isnziα y)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm x y

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
α: F ⟹ G
isnziα: is_nat_z_iso α
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
x, y: C
pr1 Gm x y
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (isnziα (x ⊗_{ M} y)) =
is_z_isomorphism_mor (isnziα x)
⊗^{ N} is_z_isomorphism_mor (isnziα y) · pr1 Fm x y

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
α: F ⟹ G
isnziα: is_nat_z_iso α
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
x, y: C
aux:= α x ⊗^{ N} α y,,
is_z_iso_bifunctor_z_iso N 
  (α x) (α y) (isnziα x) 
  (isnziα y)
:
z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (G x ⊗_{ N} G y): z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (G x ⊗_{ N} G y)
pr1 Gm x y
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (isnziα (x ⊗_{ M} y)) =
is_z_isomorphism_mor (isnziα x)
⊗^{ N} is_z_isomorphism_mor (isnziα y) · pr1 Fm x y

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
α: F ⟹ G
isnziα: is_nat_z_iso α
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
x, y: C
aux:= α x ⊗^{ N} α y,,
is_z_iso_bifunctor_z_iso N 
  (α x) (α y) (isnziα x) 
  (isnziα y)
:
z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (G x ⊗_{ N} G y): z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (G x ⊗_{ N} G y)
pr1 Fm x y =
aux
· (pr1 Gm x y
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (isnziα (x ⊗_{ M} y)))

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
α: F ⟹ G
isnziα: is_nat_z_iso α
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
x, y: C
aux:= α x ⊗^{ N} α y,,
is_z_iso_bifunctor_z_iso N 
  (α x) (α y) (isnziα x) 
  (isnziα y)
:
z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (G x ⊗_{ N} G y): z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (G x ⊗_{ N} G y)
pr1 Fm x y =
aux · pr1 Gm x y
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (isnziα (x ⊗_{ M} y))

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
α: F ⟹ G
isnziα: is_nat_z_iso α
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
x, y: C
aux:= α x ⊗^{ N} α y,,
is_z_iso_bifunctor_z_iso N 
  (α x) (α y) (isnziα x) 
  (isnziα y)
:
z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (G x ⊗_{ N} G y): z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (G x ⊗_{ N} G y)
aux · pr1 Gm x y =
pr1 Fm x y · (α (x ⊗_{ M} y),, isnziα (x ⊗_{ M} y))

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
α: F ⟹ G
isnziα: is_nat_z_iso α
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
x, y: C
aux:= α x ⊗^{ N} α y,,
is_z_iso_bifunctor_z_iso N 
  (α x) (α y) (isnziα x) 
  (isnziα y)
:
z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (G x ⊗_{ N} G y): z_iso (F x ⊗_{ N} F y) (G x ⊗_{ N} G y)
α x ⊗^{ N} α y · pr1 Gm x y =
pr1 Fm x y · α (x ⊗_{ M} y)

      apply (!(pr1 ismnt x y)).
    
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
α: F ⟹ G
isnziα: is_nat_z_iso α
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Gm Fm
  (nat_z_iso_inv (α,, isnziα))
 
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
α: F ⟹ G
isnziα: is_nat_z_iso α
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Gm Fm
  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv (α,, isnziα))

      
C, D: category
M: monoidal C
N: monoidal D
F, G: C ⟶ D
Fm: fmonoidal_lax M N F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax M N G
α: F ⟹ G
isnziα: is_nat_z_iso α
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm =
fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm
· (α I_{ M},, isnziα I_{ M})

      apply (!(pr2 ismnt)).
  Qed.
End InverseMonoidalNaturalTransformation.

Local Open Scope moncat.

(**
 9. Bundled versions
 *)
Definition lax_monoidal_functor
           (V₁ V₂ : monoidal_cat)
  : UU
  := ∑ (F : V₁ ⟶ V₂), fmonoidal_lax V₁ V₂ F.

Coercion lax_monoidal_functor_to_functor
         {V₁ V₂ : monoidal_cat}
         (F : lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂)
  : V₁ ⟶ V₂
  := pr1 F.

Coercion lax_monoidal_functor_to_fmonoidal_lax
         {V₁ V₂ : monoidal_cat}
         (F : lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂)
  : fmonoidal_lax V₁ V₂ F
  := pr2 F.

Definition symmetric_lax_monoidal_functor
           (V₁ V₂ : sym_monoidal_cat)
  : UU
  := ∑ (F : lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂),
     is_symmetric_monoidal_functor (pr2 V₁) (pr2 V₂) (pr2 F).

Coercion symmetric_lax_monoidal_functor_to_lax_monoidal
         {V₁ V₂ : sym_monoidal_cat}
         (F : symmetric_lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂)
  : lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
  := pr1 F.

Definition strong_monoidal_functor
           (V₁ V₂ : monoidal_cat)
  : UU
  := ∑ (F : V₁ ⟶ V₂), fmonoidal V₁ V₂ F.

Coercion strong_monoidal_functor_to_lax_monoidal_functor
         {V₁ V₂ : monoidal_cat}
         (F : strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂)
  : lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
  := pr1 F ,, pr12 F.

Definition symmetric_strong_monoidal_functor
           (V₁ V₂ : sym_monoidal_cat)
  : UU
  := ∑ (F : strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂),
     is_symmetric_monoidal_functor (pr2 V₁) (pr2 V₂) (pr2 F).

Coercion symmetric_strong_monoidal_functor_to_strong_monoidal
         {V₁ V₂ : sym_monoidal_cat}
         (F : symmetric_strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂)
  : strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
  := pr1 F.

Coercion symmetric_strong_monoidal_functor_to_lax_symmetric
         {V₁ V₂ : sym_monoidal_cat}
         (F : symmetric_strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂)
  : symmetric_lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
  := (pr11 F ,, pr121 F) ,, pr2 F.

Definition mon_functor_unit
           {V₁ V₂ : monoidal_cat}
           (F : lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂)
  : I_{V₂} --> F (I_{V₁})
  := pr212 F.

Definition mon_functor_tensor
           {V₁ V₂ : monoidal_cat}
           (F : lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂)
           (x y : V₁)
  : F x ⊗ F y --> F(x ⊗ y)
  := pr112 F x y.

Section MonoidalFunctorAccessors.
  Context {V₁ V₂ : monoidal_cat}
          (F : lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂).

  
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
# F f #⊗ # F g · mon_functor_tensor F x₂ y₂ =
mon_functor_tensor F x₁ y₁ · # F (f #⊗ g)

  
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
# F f #⊗ # F g · mon_functor_tensor F x₂ y₂ =
mon_functor_tensor F x₁ y₁ · # F (f #⊗ g)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
# F f ⊗^{ pr2 V₂} # F g · mon_functor_tensor F x₂ y₂ =
mon_functor_tensor F x₁ y₁ · # F (f ⊗^{ pr2 V₁} g)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
# F f ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F y₁
· F x₂ ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} # F g
· mon_functor_tensor F x₂ y₂ =
mon_functor_tensor F x₁ y₁
· # F (f ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{r} y₁ · x₂ ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{l} g)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
# F f ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F y₁
· (F x₂ ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} # F g
   · mon_functor_tensor F x₂ y₂) =
mon_functor_tensor F x₁ y₁
· # F (f ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{r} y₁ · x₂ ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{l} g)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
# F f ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F y₁
· (F x₂ ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} # F g
   · mon_functor_tensor F x₂ y₂) = ?b
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
?b =
mon_functor_tensor F x₁ y₁
· # F (f ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{r} y₁ · x₂ ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{l} g)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
# F f ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F y₁
· (F x₂ ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} # F g
   · mon_functor_tensor F x₂ y₂) = ?b

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
F x₂ ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} # F g
· mon_functor_tensor F x₂ y₂ = ?t2

      apply (fmonoidal_preservestensornatleft (pr2 F)).
    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
# F f ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F y₁
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) x₂ y₁
   · # (pr1 F) (x₂ ⊗^{ V₁}_{l} g)) =
mon_functor_tensor F x₁ y₁
· # F (f ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{r} y₁ · x₂ ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{l} g)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
# F f ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F y₁
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) x₂ y₁
· # (pr1 F) (x₂ ⊗^{ V₁}_{l} g) =
mon_functor_tensor F x₁ y₁
· # F (f ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{r} y₁ · x₂ ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{l} g)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
# F f ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F y₁
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) x₂ y₁
· # (pr1 F) (x₂ ⊗^{ V₁}_{l} g) = ?b
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
?b =
mon_functor_tensor F x₁ y₁
· # F (f ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{r} y₁ · x₂ ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{l} g)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
# F f ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F y₁
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) x₂ y₁
· # (pr1 F) (x₂ ⊗^{ V₁}_{l} g) = ?b

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
# F f ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F y₁
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) x₂ y₁ = ?y'

      apply (fmonoidal_preservestensornatright (pr2 F)).
    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) x₁ y₁
· # (pr1 F) (f ⊗^{ V₁}_{r} y₁)
· # (pr1 F) (x₂ ⊗^{ V₁}_{l} g) =
mon_functor_tensor F x₁ y₁
· # F (f ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{r} y₁ · x₂ ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{l} g)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) x₁ y₁
· (# (pr1 F) (f ⊗^{ V₁}_{r} y₁)
   · # (pr1 F) (x₂ ⊗^{ V₁}_{l} g)) =
mon_functor_tensor F x₁ y₁
· # F (f ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{r} y₁ · x₂ ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{l} g)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
# (pr1 F) (f ⊗^{ V₁}_{r} y₁)
· # (pr1 F) (x₂ ⊗^{ V₁}_{l} g) =
# F (f ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{r} y₁ · x₂ ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{l} g)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
# (pr1 F) (f ⊗^{ V₁}_{r} y₁ · x₂ ⊗^{ V₁}_{l} g) =
# F (f ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{r} y₁ · x₂ ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{l} g)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
mon_functor_tensor F x y #⊗ identity (F z)
· mon_functor_tensor F (x ⊗ y) z
· # F (mon_lassociator x y z) =
mon_lassociator (F x) (F y) (F z)
· identity (F x) #⊗ mon_functor_tensor F y z
· mon_functor_tensor F x (y ⊗ z)

  
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
mon_functor_tensor F x y #⊗ identity (F z)
· mon_functor_tensor F (x ⊗ y) z
· # F (mon_lassociator x y z) =
mon_lassociator (F x) (F y) (F z)
· identity (F x) #⊗ mon_functor_tensor F y z
· mon_functor_tensor F x (y ⊗ z)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
mon_functor_tensor F x y #⊗ identity (F z)
· mon_functor_tensor F (x ⊗ y) z
· # F (mon_lassociator x y z) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) x y
⊗^{ V₂}_{r} pr1 F z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) (x ⊗_{ V₁} y)
    z · # (pr1 F) α^{ V₁ }_{ x, y, z}
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
α^{ V₂ }_{ pr1 F x, pr1 F y, pr1 F z}
· pr1 F x
  ⊗^{ V₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) y
                z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) x
    (y ⊗_{ V₁} z) =
mon_lassociator (F x) (F y) (F z)
· identity (F x) #⊗ mon_functor_tensor F y z
· mon_functor_tensor F x (y ⊗ z)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
mon_functor_tensor F x y #⊗ identity (F z)
· mon_functor_tensor F (x ⊗ y) z
· # F (mon_lassociator x y z) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) x y
⊗^{ V₂}_{r} pr1 F z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) (x ⊗_{ V₁} y)
    z · # (pr1 F) α^{ V₁ }_{ x, y, z}
 
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
mon_functor_tensor F x y #⊗ identity (F z)
· mon_functor_tensor F (x ⊗ y) z =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) x y
⊗^{ V₂}_{r} pr1 F z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) (x ⊗_{ V₁} y)
    z

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
mon_functor_tensor F x y #⊗ identity (F z) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) x y
⊗^{ V₂}_{r} pr1 F z

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
mon_functor_tensor F x y ⊗^{ pr2 V₂} identity (F z) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) x y
⊗^{ V₂}_{r} pr1 F z

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
mon_functor_tensor F x y ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F z
· F (x ⊗ y) ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} identity (F z) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) x y
⊗^{ V₂}_{r} pr1 F z

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
mon_functor_tensor F x y ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F z
· F (x ⊗ y) ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} identity (F z) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) x y
⊗^{ V₂}_{r} pr1 F z · identity (F (x ⊗ y) ⊗ F z)

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
F (x ⊗ y) ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} identity (F z) =
identity (F (x ⊗ y) ⊗ F z)

      apply (bifunctor_leftid V₂).
    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
α^{ V₂ }_{ pr1 F x, pr1 F y, pr1 F z}
· pr1 F x
  ⊗^{ V₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) y
                z
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) x
    (y ⊗_{ V₁} z) =
mon_lassociator (F x) (F y) (F z)
· identity (F x) #⊗ mon_functor_tensor F y z
· mon_functor_tensor F x (y ⊗ z)
 
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
α^{ V₂ }_{ pr1 F x, pr1 F y, pr1 F z}
· pr1 F x
  ⊗^{ V₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) y
                z =
mon_lassociator (F x) (F y) (F z)
· identity (F x) #⊗ mon_functor_tensor F y z

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
pr1 F x
⊗^{ V₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) y z =
identity (F x) #⊗ mon_functor_tensor F y z

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
pr1 F x
⊗^{ V₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) y z =
identity (F x) ⊗^{ pr2 V₂} mon_functor_tensor F y z

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
pr1 F x
⊗^{ V₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) y z =
identity (F x) ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} (F y ⊗ F z)
· F x ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} mon_functor_tensor F y z

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
identity (pr1 F x ⊗_{ V₂} (pr1 F y ⊗_{ V₂} pr1 F z))
· pr1 F x
  ⊗^{ V₂}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) y
                z =
identity (F x) ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} (F y ⊗ F z)
· F x ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} mon_functor_tensor F y z

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
identity (pr1 F x ⊗_{ V₂} (pr1 F y ⊗_{ V₂} pr1 F z)) =
identity (F x) ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} (F y ⊗ F z)

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
identity (F x) ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} (F y ⊗ F z) =
identity (pr1 F x ⊗_{ V₂} (pr1 F y ⊗_{ V₂} pr1 F z))

      apply (bifunctor_rightid V₂).
  Qed.

  
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
mon_rassociator (F x) (F y) (F z)
· mon_functor_tensor F x y #⊗ identity (F z)
· mon_functor_tensor F (x ⊗ y) z =
identity (F x) #⊗ mon_functor_tensor F y z
· mon_functor_tensor F x (y ⊗ z)
· # F (mon_rassociator x y z)

· (identity (F x) #⊗ mon_functor_tensor F y z
   · mon_functor_tensor F x (y ⊗ z)) = ?y'

V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
?b = ?y'

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
identity (F x ⊗ (F y ⊗ F z))
· (identity (F x) #⊗ mon_functor_tensor F y z
   · mon_functor_tensor F x (y ⊗ z)) = ?b

        
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
identity (F x ⊗ (F y ⊗ F z)) = ?y'0

        
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
?y'0 = identity (F x ⊗ (F y ⊗ F z))

        apply mon_rassociator_lassociator.
      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
mon_rassociator (F x) (F y) (F z)
· mon_lassociator (F x) (F y) (F z)
· (identity (F x) #⊗ mon_functor_tensor F y z
   · mon_functor_tensor F x (y ⊗ z)) = ?y'

F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
mon_rassociator (F x) (F y) (F z)
· (mon_lassociator (F x) (F y) (F z)
   · (identity (F x) #⊗ mon_functor_tensor F y z
      · mon_functor_tensor F x (y ⊗ z))) = ?y'

F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
mon_lassociator (F x) (F y) (F z)
· (identity (F x) #⊗ mon_functor_tensor F y z
   · mon_functor_tensor F x (y ⊗ z)) = ?t2

F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
mon_lassociator (F x) (F y) (F z)
· identity (F x) #⊗ mon_functor_tensor F y z
· mon_functor_tensor F x (y ⊗ z) = ?t2

F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
?t2 =
mon_lassociator (F x) (F y) (F z)
· identity (F x) #⊗ mon_functor_tensor F y z
· mon_functor_tensor F x (y ⊗ z)

      apply mon_functor_lassociator.
    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
mon_rassociator (F x) (F y) (F z)
· (mon_functor_tensor F x y #⊗ identity (F z)
   · mon_functor_tensor F (x ⊗ y) z
   · # F (mon_lassociator x y z))
· # F (mon_rassociator x y z) =
mon_rassociator (F x) (F y) (F z)
· mon_functor_tensor F x y #⊗ identity (F z)
· mon_functor_tensor F (x ⊗ y) z

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
mon_rassociator (F x) (F y) (F z)
· (mon_functor_tensor F x y #⊗ identity (F z)
   · (mon_functor_tensor F (x ⊗ y) z
      · (# F (mon_lassociator x y z)
         · # F (mon_rassociator x y z)))) =
mon_rassociator (F x) (F y) (F z)
· (mon_functor_tensor F x y #⊗ identity (F z)
   · mon_functor_tensor F (x ⊗ y) z)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
mon_functor_tensor F (x ⊗ y) z
· (# F (mon_lassociator x y z)
   · # F (mon_rassociator x y z)) =
mon_functor_tensor F (x ⊗ y) z

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
mon_functor_tensor F (x ⊗ y) z
· (# F (mon_lassociator x y z)
   · # F (mon_rassociator x y z)) =
mon_functor_tensor F (x ⊗ y) z
· identity (F (x ⊗ y ⊗ z))

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁
# F (mon_lassociator x y z)

# F (identity (x ⊗ y ⊗ z))

F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y, z: V₁

    apply mon_lassociator_rassociator.
  Qed.

  
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x: V₁
mon_lunitor (F x) =
mon_functor_unit F #⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_functor_tensor F I_{ V₁} x · # F (mon_lunitor x)

F: lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x: V₁
mon_lunitor (F x) =

fmonoidal_preservesunit (pr2 F) ⊗^{ V₂}_{r} pr1 F x
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) I_{ V₁} x
· # (pr1 F) lu^{ V₁ }_{ x} =
mon_functor_unit F #⊗ identity (F x)
· mon_functor_tensor F I_{ V₁} x · # F (mon_lunitor x)

· F I_{ V₁} ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} identity (F x)
