End MonoidalFunctorAccessors.

Section StrongMonoidalFunctorAccessors.
  Context {V₁ V₂ : monoidal_cat}
          (F : strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂).

  
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
V₂ ⟦ F I_{ V₁}, I_{ V₂} ⟧

  
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
V₂ ⟦ F I_{ V₁}, I_{ V₂} ⟧

    exact (inv_from_z_iso (_ ,, fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly (pr2 F))).
  Defined.

  
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
strong_functor_unit_inv · mon_functor_unit F =
identity (F I_{ V₁})

  
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
strong_functor_unit_inv · mon_functor_unit F =
identity (F I_{ V₁})

    apply z_iso_after_z_iso_inv.
  Qed.

  
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
mon_functor_unit F · strong_functor_unit_inv =
identity I_{ V₂}

  
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
mon_functor_unit F · strong_functor_unit_inv =
identity I_{ V₂}

    apply (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (_ ,, fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly (pr2 F))).
  Qed.

  
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y: V₁
V₂ ⟦ F (x ⊗ y), F x ⊗ F y ⟧

  
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y: V₁
V₂ ⟦ F (x ⊗ y), F x ⊗ F y ⟧

    exact (inv_from_z_iso (_ ,, fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly (pr2 F) x y)).
  Defined.

  
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y: V₁
strong_functor_tensor_inv x y
· mon_functor_tensor F x y = identity (F (x ⊗ y))

  
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y: V₁
strong_functor_tensor_inv x y
· mon_functor_tensor F x y = identity (F (x ⊗ y))

    apply z_iso_after_z_iso_inv.
  Qed.

  
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y: V₁
mon_functor_tensor F x y
· strong_functor_tensor_inv x y = identity (F x ⊗ F y)

  
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y: V₁
mon_functor_tensor F x y
· strong_functor_tensor_inv x y = identity (F x ⊗ F y)

    apply (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (_ ,, fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly (pr2 F) x y)).
  Qed.

  
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
strong_functor_tensor_inv x₁ y₁ · # F f #⊗ # F g =
# F (f #⊗ g) · strong_functor_tensor_inv x₂ y₂

  
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
strong_functor_tensor_inv x₁ y₁ · # F f #⊗ # F g =
# F (f #⊗ g) · strong_functor_tensor_inv x₂ y₂

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
# (pr1 F) f #⊗ # (pr1 F) g =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) x₁ y₁
· (# (pr1 F) (f #⊗ g)
   · strong_functor_tensor_inv x₂ y₂)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
# (pr1 F) f #⊗ # (pr1 F) g =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) x₁ y₁
· # (pr1 F) (f #⊗ g) · strong_functor_tensor_inv x₂ y₂

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) x₁ y₁
· # (pr1 F) (f #⊗ g) =
# (pr1 F) f #⊗ # (pr1 F) g
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) x₂ y₂

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
# (pr1 F) f #⊗ # (pr1 F) g
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) x₂ y₂ =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata (pr2 F) x₁ y₁
· # (pr1 F) (f #⊗ g)

    apply (tensor_mon_functor_tensor F).
  Qed.
End StrongMonoidalFunctorAccessors.


V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
F: symmetric_lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y: V₁
sym_mon_braiding V₂ (F x) (F y)
· mon_functor_tensor F y x =
mon_functor_tensor F x y
· # F (sym_mon_braiding V₁ x y)


V₁, V₂: sym_monoidal_cat
F: symmetric_lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
x, y: V₁
sym_mon_braiding V₂ (F x) (F y)
· mon_functor_tensor F y x =
mon_functor_tensor F x y
· # F (sym_mon_braiding V₁ x y)

  exact (pr2 F x y).
Qed.

(**
 10. Builders for the bundled versions
 *)
Definition lax_monoidal_functor_laws
           {V₁ V₂ : monoidal_cat}
           (F : V₁ ⟶ V₂)
           (μ : ∏ (x y : V₁), F x ⊗ F y --> F(x ⊗ y))
           (η : I_{V₂} --> F(I_{V₁}))
  : UU
  := (∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : V₁)
        (f : x₁ --> x₂)
        (g : y₁ --> y₂),
      #F f #⊗ #F g · μ x₂ y₂
      =
      μ x₁ y₁ · #F(f #⊗ g))
     ×
     (∏ (x : V₁),
      η #⊗ identity _ · μ (I_{V₁}) x · #F (mon_lunitor x)
      =
      mon_lunitor (F x))
     ×
     (∏ (x : V₁),
      identity _ #⊗ η · μ x (I_{V₁}) · #F (mon_runitor x)
      =
      mon_runitor (F x))
     ×
     (∏ (x y z : V₁),
      (μ x y #⊗ identity _) · μ (x ⊗ y) z · #F(mon_lassociator x y z)
      =
      mon_lassociator (F x) (F y) (F z) · (identity _ #⊗ μ y z) · μ x (y ⊗ z)).


V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
fmonoidal_laxlaws (μ,, η)


V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
fmonoidal_laxlaws (μ,, η)

  
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
preserves_tensor_nat_left
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata (μ,, η))
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
preserves_tensor_nat_right
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata (μ,, η))
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
preserves_associativity
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata (μ,, η))
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
preserves_leftunitality
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata (μ,, η))
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit (μ,, η))
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
preserves_rightunitality
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata (μ,, η))
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit (μ,, η))

  
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
preserves_tensor_nat_left
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata (μ,, η))
 
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y₁, y₂: V₁
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
F x ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} # F g · μ x y₂ =
μ x y₁ · # F (x ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{l} g)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y₁, y₂: V₁
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
F x ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} # F g · μ x y₂ =
# F (identity x) #⊗ # F g · μ x y₂
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y₁, y₂: V₁
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
μ x y₁ · # F (identity x #⊗ g) =
μ x y₁ · # F (x ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{l} g)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y₁, y₂: V₁
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
F x ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} # F g · μ x y₂ =
# F (identity x) #⊗ # F g · μ x y₂
 
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y₁, y₂: V₁
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
F x ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} # F g = # F (identity x) #⊗ # F g

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y₁, y₂: V₁
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
F x ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} # F g =
# F (identity x) ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F y₁
· F x ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} # F g

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y₁, y₂: V₁
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity (F x ⊗_{ pr2 V₂} F y₁)
· F x ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} # F g =
# F (identity x) ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F y₁
· F x ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} # F g

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y₁, y₂: V₁
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity (F x ⊗_{ pr2 V₂} F y₁) =
# F (identity x) ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F y₁

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y₁, y₂: V₁
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity (F x ⊗_{ pr2 V₂} F y₁) =
identity (F x) ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F y₁

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y₁, y₂: V₁
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity (F x) ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F y₁ =
identity (F x ⊗_{ pr2 V₂} F y₁)

      apply (bifunctor_rightid (pr2 V₂)).
    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y₁, y₂: V₁
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
μ x y₁ · # F (identity x #⊗ g) =
μ x y₁ · # F (x ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{l} g)
 
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y₁, y₂: V₁
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity x #⊗ g = x ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{l} g

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y₁, y₂: V₁
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity x ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{r} y₁ · x ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{l} g =
x ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{l} g

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y₁, y₂: V₁
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity x ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{r} y₁ · x ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{l} g =
identity (x ⊗ y₁) · x ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{l} g

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y₁, y₂: V₁
g: V₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
identity x ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{r} y₁ = identity (x ⊗ y₁)

      apply (bifunctor_rightid (pr2 V₁)).
  
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
preserves_tensor_nat_right
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata (μ,, η))
 
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x₁, x₂, y: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# F f ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F y · μ x₂ y =
μ x₁ y · # F (f ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{r} y)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x₁, x₂, y: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# F f ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F y · μ x₂ y =
# F f #⊗ # F (identity y) · μ x₂ y
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x₁, x₂, y: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
μ x₁ y · # F (f #⊗ identity y) =
μ x₁ y · # F (f ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{r} y)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x₁, x₂, y: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# F f ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F y · μ x₂ y =
# F f #⊗ # F (identity y) · μ x₂ y
 
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x₁, x₂, y: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# F f ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F y = # F f #⊗ # F (identity y)

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x₁, x₂, y: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# F f ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F y =
# F f ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F y
· F x₂ ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} # F (identity y)

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x₁, x₂, y: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# F f ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F y
· identity (F x₂ ⊗_{ pr2 V₂} F y) =
# F f ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F y
· F x₂ ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} # F (identity y)

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x₁, x₂, y: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
identity (F x₂ ⊗_{ pr2 V₂} F y) =
F x₂ ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} # F (identity y)

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x₁, x₂, y: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
identity (F x₂ ⊗_{ pr2 V₂} F y) =
F x₂ ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} identity (F y)

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x₁, x₂, y: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
F x₂ ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} identity (F y) =
identity (F x₂ ⊗_{ pr2 V₂} F y)

      apply (bifunctor_leftid (pr2 V₂)).
    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x₁, x₂, y: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
μ x₁ y · # F (f #⊗ identity y) =
μ x₁ y · # F (f ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{r} y)
 
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x₁, x₂, y: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f #⊗ identity y = f ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{r} y

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x₁, x₂, y: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{r} y · x₂ ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{l} identity y =
f ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{r} y

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x₁, x₂, y: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{r} y · x₂ ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{l} identity y =
f ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{r} y · identity (x₂ ⊗ y)

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x₁, x₂, y: V₁
f: V₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
x₂ ⊗^{ pr2 V₁}_{l} identity y = identity (x₂ ⊗ y)

      apply (bifunctor_leftid (pr2 V₁)).
  
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
preserves_associativity
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata (μ,, η))
 
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y, z: V₁
μ x y ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F z · μ (x ⊗_{ pr2 V₁} y) z
· # F α^{ pr2 V₁ }_{ x, y, z} =
α^{ pr2 V₂ }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} μ y z · μ x (y ⊗_{ pr2 V₁} z)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y, z: V₁
μ x y ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F z · μ (x ⊗_{ pr2 V₁} y) z
· # F α^{ pr2 V₁ }_{ x, y, z} =
μ x y #⊗ identity (F z) · μ (x ⊗ y) z
· # F (mon_lassociator x y z)
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y, z: V₁
mon_lassociator (F x) (F y) (F z)
· identity (F x) #⊗ μ y z · μ x (y ⊗ z) =
α^{ pr2 V₂ }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} μ y z · μ x (y ⊗_{ pr2 V₁} z)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y, z: V₁
μ x y ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F z · μ (x ⊗_{ pr2 V₁} y) z
· # F α^{ pr2 V₁ }_{ x, y, z} =
μ x y #⊗ identity (F z) · μ (x ⊗ y) z
· # F (mon_lassociator x y z)
 
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y, z: V₁
μ x y ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F z = μ x y #⊗ identity (F z)

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y, z: V₁
μ x y ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F z =
μ x y ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F z
· F (x ⊗ y) ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} identity (F z)

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y, z: V₁
μ x y ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F z
· identity (F (x ⊗_{ pr2 V₁} y) ⊗_{ pr2 V₂} F z) =
μ x y ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F z
· F (x ⊗ y) ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} identity (F z)

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y, z: V₁
identity (F (x ⊗_{ pr2 V₁} y) ⊗_{ pr2 V₂} F z) =
F (x ⊗ y) ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} identity (F z)

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y, z: V₁
F (x ⊗ y) ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} identity (F z) =
identity (F (x ⊗_{ pr2 V₁} y) ⊗_{ pr2 V₂} F z)

      apply (bifunctor_leftid (pr2 V₂)).
    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y, z: V₁
mon_lassociator (F x) (F y) (F z)
· identity (F x) #⊗ μ y z · μ x (y ⊗ z) =
α^{ pr2 V₂ }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} μ y z · μ x (y ⊗_{ pr2 V₁} z)
 
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y, z: V₁
mon_lassociator (F x) (F y) (F z)
· identity (F x) #⊗ μ y z =
α^{ pr2 V₂ }_{ F x, F y, F z}
· F x ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} μ y z

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y, z: V₁
identity (F x) #⊗ μ y z = F x ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} μ y z

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y, z: V₁
identity (F x) ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} (F y ⊗ F z)
· F x ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} μ y z =
F x ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} μ y z

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y, z: V₁
identity (F x) ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} (F y ⊗ F z)
· F x ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} μ y z =
identity (F x ⊗ (F y ⊗ F z))
· F x ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} μ y z

      
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x, y, z: V₁
identity (F x) ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} (F y ⊗ F z) =
identity (F x ⊗ (F y ⊗ F z))

      apply (bifunctor_rightid (pr2 V₂)).
  
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
preserves_leftunitality
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata (μ,, η))
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit (μ,, η))
 
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x: V₁
η ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F x · μ I_{ pr2 V₁} x
· # F lu^{ pr2 V₁ }_{ x} = lu^{ pr2 V₂ }_{ F x}

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x: V₁
η ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F x · μ I_{ pr2 V₁} x
· # F lu^{ pr2 V₁ }_{ x} =
η #⊗ identity (F x) · μ I_{ V₁} x
· # F (mon_lunitor x)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x: V₁
η ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F x = η #⊗ identity (F x)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x: V₁
η ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F x =
η ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F x
· F I_{ V₁} ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} identity (F x)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x: V₁
η ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F x
· identity (F I_{ pr2 V₁} ⊗_{ pr2 V₂} F x) =
η ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} F x
· F I_{ V₁} ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} identity (F x)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x: V₁
identity (F I_{ pr2 V₁} ⊗_{ pr2 V₂} F x) =
F I_{ V₁} ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} identity (F x)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x: V₁
F I_{ V₁} ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} identity (F x) =
identity (F I_{ pr2 V₁} ⊗_{ pr2 V₂} F x)

    apply (bifunctor_leftid (pr2 V₂)).
  
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
preserves_rightunitality
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata (μ,, η))
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit (μ,, η))
 
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x: V₁
F x ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} η · μ x I_{ pr2 V₁}
· # F ru^{ pr2 V₁ }_{ x} = ru^{ pr2 V₂ }_{ F x}

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x: V₁
F x ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} η · μ x I_{ pr2 V₁}
· # F ru^{ pr2 V₁ }_{ x} =
identity (F x) #⊗ η · μ x I_{ V₁}
· # F (mon_runitor x)

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x: V₁
F x ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} η = identity (F x) #⊗ η

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x: V₁
F x ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} η =
identity (F x) ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} I_{ V₂}
· F x ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} η

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x: V₁
identity (F x ⊗_{ pr2 V₂} I_{ pr2 V₂})
· F x ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} η =
identity (F x) ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} I_{ V₂}
· F x ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{l} η

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x: V₁
identity (F x ⊗_{ pr2 V₂} I_{ pr2 V₂}) =
identity (F x) ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} I_{ V₂}

    
V₁, V₂: monoidal_cat
F: V₁ ⟶ V₂
μ: ∏ x y : V₁, V₂ ⟦ F x ⊗ F y, F (x ⊗ y) ⟧
η: V₂ ⟦ I_{ V₂}, F I_{ V₁} ⟧
HF: lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η
x: V₁
identity (F x) ⊗^{ pr2 V₂}_{r} I_{ V₂} =
identity (F x ⊗_{ pr2 V₂} I_{ pr2 V₂})

    apply (bifunctor_rightid (pr2 V₂)).
Qed.

Definition make_lax_monoidal_functor
           {V₁ V₂ : monoidal_cat}
           (F : V₁ ⟶ V₂)
           (μ : ∏ (x y : V₁), F x ⊗ F y --> F(x ⊗ y))
           (η : I_{V₂} --> F(I_{V₁}))
           (HF : lax_monoidal_functor_laws F μ η)
  : lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
  := F ,, (μ ,, η) ,, lax_monoidal_functor_laws_to_monoidal_laws HF.

Definition make_strong_monoidal_functor
           {V₁ V₂ : monoidal_cat}
           (F : lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂)
           (Hμ : ∏ (x y : V₁), is_z_isomorphism (mon_functor_tensor F x y))
           (Hη : is_z_isomorphism (mon_functor_unit F))
  : strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
  := pr1 F ,, pr2 F ,, Hμ ,, Hη.

Definition symmetric_monoidal_functor_laws
           {V₁ V₂ : sym_monoidal_cat}
           (F : lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y : V₁),
     sym_mon_braiding V₂ (F x) (F y) · mon_functor_tensor F y x
     =
     mon_functor_tensor F x y · #F(sym_mon_braiding V₁ x y).

Definition make_symmetric_lax_monoidal_functor
           {V₁ V₂ : sym_monoidal_cat}
           (F : lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂)
           (HF : symmetric_monoidal_functor_laws F)
  : symmetric_lax_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
  := F ,, HF.

Definition make_symmetric_strong_monoidal_functor
           {V₁ V₂ : sym_monoidal_cat}
           (F : strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂)
           (HF : symmetric_monoidal_functor_laws F)
  : symmetric_strong_monoidal_functor V₁ V₂
  := F ,, HF.
